When lockdowns first hit, I found myself here, watching this video over and over. It became a safe haven during those tough nights when I felt alone, uncertain, and needed something to get me through. Today, on November 7, 2024, I’ve returned to say thank you. This video became more than just entertainment; it was a lifeline, a constant reminder that I wasn’t alone in my struggles. Through all those late, lonely nights, this video brought me comfort and helped me hold on to hope. Thank you for creating something so meaningful—it made a difference when I needed it most. Thank you aurora vibes ❤❤

If there is anyone curious, this is how to get saved and be right with God who loves us for eternal life! 
As anyone can get saved, if they make the choice to do so!

1-Realize that all have sinned before God in one way or another.

Romans 3: 10-12+23 (KJB) 
10. "As it is written, There is none righteous, no, not one:"
11."There is none that understandeth, there is none that seeketh after God."
12."They are all gone out of the way, they are together become unprofitable; there is none that doeth good, no, not one."
23. “For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God.”

2-Realize that God still loved us enough, to allow Jesus Christ to shed his blood on the cross to pay the price for our sins

Romans 5: 8-9+12 (KJB) 
8. “But God commendeth his love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us."
9."Much more then, being now justified by his blood, we shall be saved from wrath through him."
12. “Wherefore, as by one man sin entered into the world, and death by sin; and so death passed upon all men, for all that have sinned:”

3 -To be saved, you just need to confess unto God and ask him to save you, by accepting Jesus Christ paying the price for your sins, all in order to receive this freely given gift of forgiveness.

1 Corinthians 15: 1-4 (KJB)
1."Moreover, brethren, I declare unto you the gospel which I preached unto you, which also ye have received, and wherein ye stand;
2."By which also ye are saved, if ye keep in memory what I preached unto you, unless ye have believed in vain.”
3."For I delivered unto you first of all that which I also received, how that Christ died for our sins according to the scriptures;”
4."And that he was buried, and that he rose again the third day according to the scriptures:”

Romans 10: 9-10+13 (KJB)
9. “That if thou shalt confess with thy mouth the Lord Jesus, and shalt believe in thine heart that God hath raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved.”
10."For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation."
13."For whosoever shall call upon the name of the Lord shall be saved."

4. Otherwise you will have to pay the wages for any/all of your sins, on your own, which is to face Gods eternal judgment, of burning forever in hell,  to not be able to sin before God ever again.

Hebrews 9: 27-28 (KJB)
27."And as it is appointed unto men once to die, but after this the judgment:"
28."So Christ was once offered to bear the sins of many; and unto them that look for him shall he appear the second time without sin unto salvation.”

Revelation 21: 8 (KJB)
"But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.”

Romans 6: 23 (KJB)
“For the wages of sin is death; but the gift of God is eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.”

(Lastly, an example of what to genuinely say to God in prayer to get saved and fully forgiven of all your sins.)
“Dear God, I am a sinner and need saving.
 I know I’m not good enough to get to heaven and I need you to save me. 
I need the righteousness of your son, Jesus Christ.
I believe that Jesus is the Lord, who died, was buried and resurrected so that his precious blood can wash away my sins. 
I trust in him alone to save me. 
Nothing else.
 Not my good works or anything else. 
Only Jesus.
 I pray this in Jesus’ name, Amen.”

Hey you, how's life been up to?
I know that it's easy to think that nothing's working out anymore, nothing's making you happy and that you hate everything about your life. It can even lead to wanting to end your life, but doing this only transfers the heartbreak and the sadness to someone else, a loved one or a friend perhaps. But you know what, if you think a little about it, I'm sure you can find at least one thing you actually like about yourself. It could be your voice, your kind heart, your amazing personality, your bright smile, even if you don't show it that much anymore. For example, I like the fact that I can make people feel better, even if I feel horrible on the inside. I like the fact that I can be a pillar to my friends when they need support, although I need one too. You know what, feeling this way, wanting to let all of your emotions out, really just shows how strong and capable you are, because after all that you've been through, you're still here, reading this message. Or not, it's your choice. I just want you to know that you're valid about all these mental breakdowns or sad and depressing thoughts you have at night, or at day. Have a good day, or night!

Ironically, I want to feel sad. I had a very confronting past, but since my saddest moments were mixed it with the memories of my awakening/genuine consciousness, I’d rather go back to those hellish times than be where I am now.
As a kid, I thought of this exact situation, death.
Where you feel nothing forever.
Of course, this isn’t forever, this has been nearly 5 years though.
When I thought of it back then, it was the scariest thing I could think of, now that I’m neck deep in it, I’m not nearly alive enough to actually feel scared about it either.
I found a way to get out of it all thankfully, but it’s so damn hard to do it on empty fumes, and honestly, that’s the whole idea.
If I manage to live the ideal life, even if just out of survival, I will surely be better off depressed and free than depressed and shackled.
I’ll never die, that thought has crossed my mind only in those helish times, but because I made it out of it, it’s impossible for me to leave in such a pathetic way.
Whether I live for 100 years or 2000 years, I’ll surely figure out enough to become innocent again, no matter the amount of time I have.
Though, to make sure that happens, I must stay in this limbo, regardless of how empty and boring it is.
I’ve cut ties with so much people now to start anew, while they all forget about me, for a year, 5 more years, a decade, HOWEVER long it may be, I’ll be training everything in secret just as I have been in the open these past 5 years anyways.
These 5 years have just been me stretching the boundaries of comprehension, making conclusions about everything I knew, and redefined as much as I could, but that is impure.
I realise now, more than anything, having conclusion towards the things in life is the greatest sin of all, the deepest limitation, a belief.
I know too much now to blindly believe in something, so the next best thing is to remove all beliefs, and become limitless.

If this message is by any means relatable or even hopeful, then by all means, join me in this silent struggle for a broken, hero’s story.
We all need a hero, but if no one can be there to save you, you MUST save yourself.
Though of course, I wish I was lucky enough to of had a psychoanalyst look at me, instead of me becoming one myself just to find any sense of closure.
But, that’s life I guess, bad luck of the draw. It’s really not my fault, but blaming my family and tens of bullies, would be my fault, so I’ll stop there with the hinted context.

To all the people who need this...	

	Always remember, you are not alone. There are other people like you out there. You are loved, and you always will be. You are not forgotten. You are beautiful, inside and out. You are your own worst enemy, so when you try to put yourself down, don't listen to yourself. People can be be mean. When someone tries to wear you down, don't listen. You are strong, and don't ever forget that. If it seems like you're all alone, you're not. As long as the child within you is there, you are in good company. Never forget that you need help sometimes, so get help before it's too late. You can talk to people about what you're going through. It's not good to keep things inside. If something becomes to much, it's okay to get away. It's okay to want to be alone. You don't need someone else to make you feel good. If someone doesn't like you, just love yourself twice as much. Just know this, you are a good person. You're real. You will be okay, even if you aren't yet. Tell yourself these things when you start to think they aren't true, because they are and they always will be. When you think you're alone, read this. When you feel unloved, read this. When you feel forgotten or ugly, read this. When you become your worst enemy, read this. Read this because you need to know that these bad things aren't true. Love will stay constant. For as long as you live, and even after, you will be loved. You need to know that. You need to believe that. You need to remember that. You need to tell other people that, so they never get to where you are. You need to tell other people that so they can start to be okay. Life is only so long, we can't waste ours on sorrow.

You deserve to get up in the morning and feel good about yourself. You deserve to feel something- to feel every damn second alive in this lifetime. It’s heartbreaking that you think you’re not capable of being loved, because you are, I love you trough all my words and I hope you let it happen in your heart. Love is scary, I know, maybe you heart had been broken once and since then you wanted to be rather numb than feel ever again, it hurts me how you punish yourself, does it not deserve love? Because YOU DO deserve love, please forgive yourself, it’s not your fault that the demons want to take over your beautiful heart. You’re not a bad person for distancing yourself from others, but you deserve someone to talk to, you deserve someone to listen. I am listening, you can tell me what’s wrong. It’s everything, isn’t it? There’s something pulling your heartstrings on the ground and no one seems to understand how misunderstood you feel, it’s heartbreaking to know that I am behind the screen and can’t give you a hug, that’s why I will give you a big warm virtual hug and send you lots of love :). You matter. You are worthy. You are loved. You deserve good things. You deserve someone to listen. You deserve to eat and drink. You deserve to feel good and alive. You deserve to smile. You deserve a hug. You deserve to be all the things you want to be, because you deserve to have and feel good things happening to you and have a fulfilled life. I know I might not know you personally but I care about you so much, I write this because I want you to stay here with me, I want you to hold on a little longer because you matter so much to me, because I will not let you give up on yourself. I want you to see that you should not give up on yourself because you DESERVE GOOD THINGS. I want you to look back on the time when you were a kid, you didn’t give up when you tried to swim for the first time, you didn’t give up when you tired to walk for the first time and fell, you never gave up on yourself, you always kept on pushing forwards, so why can’t you now? I know it’s tiring, your mentally tired, but dont your younger self deserve good things? look back at your eyes that used to be full of hope, look back on those dreams. Don’t let yourself fall, you deserve better. We will both fight, I will fight for you. I won’t let those demons get to you. You can hold on to me, I won’t let you down :). Whenever you feel lonely, then look at the sky, I always look at it and think about you. Yes, you, because it makes me happy that there’s someone looking right back, maybe we can’t see each other but I can feel your presence here with me and that’s enough for me, because I am glad your heart is beating and you’re still fighting. You’re so much stronger thank you think, you didn’t leave your spot on this earth even if you wanted to, you belong here, even though it doesn’t feel like it, when you don’t feel like belonging than build your own home here, put all your love in it and dreams. Think of you as a star when you feel alone, you shine because your heart is good, no matter what mistake you made, no matter about the past you had, you’re one of the stars that shine bright in the universe because you’re heart is beautiful, that’s why the demons in your mind wants to have it. As one of the stars you see others stars, maybe they have felt the same way as you do at some point in there life, but they lighten up the universe with each other’s presence. You’re a star for me, maybe you don’t see it yourself but I can see it, you’re beautiful from inside and out, your body is beautiful the way it is. You make me happy by reading this, you make me feel something by your presence and when you can make me feel that way than you also make other  people feel that way about you too. I hope you stay for yourself and don’t let your story get written by others but by yourself, it’s your story not theirs. As you can see, I say a lot of “I hope” because I have hope for you even if you don’t have it for yourself, I see hope in you even though you might want to give up. That’s why I hope you won’t see the world in darkness and will see it colorful again, I hope I will give you a glimpse of hope and make the world you see a bit colorful for today. My favorite color is yellow, and I hope the next time you see the color yellow you will think about my words. If someone left you than don’t blame yourself, don’t think you weren’t enough, don’t lower yourself for someone who couldn’t see the awesomeness in you. If you lost someone I am so sorry for your loss, they want you happy, I hope you don’t feel guilty or regret because you were there, you spend enough time with them, they want you to be happy. They are in a good and safe place now. If someone broke your heart than I am so sorry that they couldn’t see the way you look so beautiful because of the heart you have. Anyone who gets to be with you, doesn’t know how fucking lucky he/ she/ they is :). If you aren’t accepted at home or in general than I am so sorry that you have to deal with someone/ something you shouldn’t be ashamed of, I accept you and support you, I accept you as a human being no matter what race, religion, nationality, skin color, or sexuality you have. You’re safe here with me :). You’re not useless, you’re not a burden to anyone. You’re not a problem, you’re human and your feelings are valid. You’re not being dramatic. Please don’t starve yourself, you deserve food and to drink, I know it’s hard. It hurts to see that you’re in so much pain :( you deserve so much man, don’t let your emotions control you. Don’t let them get the best of you.  I am sorry no one is noticing, I wish /hope I could take your pain away for today or even for a moment while you’re reading this. If no one told you, I am so proud of you, you’re reading this and it’s enough for me to be proud of you because you’re here and that’s all that matters to me. If it’s night for you, go to sleep, I know it’s hard to fall asleep right now but you deserve a good sleep. If you have nightmares, please, don’t let them fight you. If it’s day for you, don’t start it by such sad music, I know it’s impossible to have a good day with such mindset but take baby steps, start by drinking two cups of water everyday in the morning and so on.. You will start building little healthy habits. If it’s evening for you, you’re probably overwhelmed and stressed, I want you to know it’s okay to feel the way you feel. You don’t need to be scared, of course you’re overwhelmed or stressed, I mean who wouldn’t? But it’s important to know that when you feel that way you should do a little self care, such as taking a bath for example? You deserve to feel at ease and relaxed. 
And if you are somewhere in between I hope you know that you’re so strong for breathing despite the pain, I know you will make it :) I believe in you. All I want for you is to stay here, I really mean all my words, even if there is a lot of unsaid things I want to tell u and my text is getting longer and longer,I want you here
 

I hope one day your smile will become a genuine one where you don’t need to fake it anymore, because I can’t say this enough, you deserve a good smile and to feel alive. You’re worth more than every fucking cent in this world.

You can let go for today, I got you, you can cry your heart out as much as you want, but don’t let it tear you down and let your emotions control you by giving up. Crying is not weakness. Life for those who couldn’t, smile for those who forgot what a genuine smile is, love like there’s no other, hug like its your last one.

Everyone here has probably gone through something so I got something to say to yall. It's ok to be sad, it's ok to be hurt, it's ok to be depressed. Don't be scared to show your feelings because the best medicine to all these things is company from someone. And sometimes the best time for you and someone else to get closer is when the most important feelings inside you are open to their judgment and eyes. Only then will they see how truly hurt you are and it only makes them want to help you out more. So if you got a friend, family, or ANYONE really. Don't be scared to open up.

Some of you guys have gone through a breakup. For those people I must say this. If they left you and didn't want you it's fine. It's not your fault or their fault. It's the feelings fault. Don't blame anything. Just focus on yourself king/queen. Make YOURSELF better. Work on YOURSELF to become the best. To the point of were everyone will want you. Trust me it will come and it will happen. Go to the gym it doesn't matter about your gender. Just work out and you'll see how easy it will be to let out those feelings on those weights. Just remember one thing at the gym. You aren't the only one there that have gone through trauma. Doesn't matter if it's death or break up or whatever else there is. Every single person there has gone through some tough times. So go and build your body to what you desire for it to look like. And show those weights no mercy. I hope yall get better one day and I love you all. Just like everyone else here loves you. Good luck king/queen. I hope you make it big. ✌

I know it doesn't have much to do with this place,but I wanted to leave it here just in case anyone is interested in reading a piece of my life story. This saved my life,and might save yours too. I was an atheist in the past, but thanks to a person who spoke about God to me, a guy who studied theology and metaphysics, using different words from the ones everyone used to fight me for being an atheist, I came to believe and realize the true presence of God in my life. there are scientific explanations for what God does,at a more “quantum” level of science,involving changes in the magnetic field,vibrations,with operation sometimes similar to a particle accelerator,where human mind is not able to fully manipulate. This person was talking about science, and when I said that God didn't exist, the person told me that God doesn't need to exist, because it was God who created the concept of existence. God is infinitely beyond the laws of the universe and we are not able to understand the Presence of God, but God is who He is, although we mere beings in the universe cannot understand this. I may not understand, but I feel the presence of God. I am infinitely grateful to the person who explained this to me, because her studies and her explanation is what saved my life. Maybe I can't explain rationally what leads me to believe, but there are many coincidences, day after day, synchronicities, things that I ask for in prayer and that come true, moments when I've found myself without strength or peace and suddenly strength and serenity return instantly, cases of sick relatives where doctors said there was no way out and in the end things work out and the cure appears at once... we are only human beings, we are a creation within the Universe, just like all the other existing things. We have limits. Sometimes I think we are a little ignorant in wanting to understand the full complexity of this reality we live in, and wanting to determine whether God exists or not. I believe there are certain things in this Universe that we just don't have the ability to understand or explain. Just as an ant does not understand the world of human beings, human beings cannot understand a spiritual world and the Universe as a whole. God provides human beings with the ability that no other being in nature has to think rationally and develop science and medicine. Blind faith is never true faith. We do what we can with our human power, and the Creator does things at more advanced levels, at a more “quantum” level of science, involving vibrations, with operation sometimes similar to a particle accelerator, where human science is not able to fully manipulate...there are scientific explanations for miracles,as I said,involving changes in the magnetic field and the like, but we mere mortals do not have such power to fully understand. I love you and wish ya all the best! :)

A dear person whoever reads this, Hey, you, yes, I am talking right to you. I hope you will see yourself with the eyes I see you one day because I can tell you have some awesome music taste :) You’re such a beautiful human being and worth and enough. I hope you know that you do only need yourself to be happy, I know society builds up the standard that whenever you’re alone you’re not living a happy life. But in fact, that is not true, if you start to realize that you actually deserve all the good things happening to you, you will treat yourself a lot nicer. I hope you let yourself rest, don’t beat yourself up over past mistakes, over regret, and over everything your mind wants to destroy you. I wish I could remove all those demons inside of your head because you deserve to feel happy. If you ever feel lonely then watch the sky, because you know, someone, at the same time is watching the sky too, maybe feeling the same way..I am glad you exist and I hope you won’t ever remove your own spot in this world, maybe you don’t feel like you belong here but, Angel, then build your home here. I don’t want you to leave this world unhappy. I want you to live every little second, I want you to feel alive, I don’t want you to see yourself just existing. You deserve it. Whatever happened, it’s not your fault, the demons in your head recognize that you have a beautiful heart, they want to take it because they have never seen such a beautiful heart as yours, so why let them win over you? . You’re not selfish for isolating yourself, but you deserve to talk to someone. If you’re reading this then please never forget to breathe and smile. 

Don’t live up to other standards! It’s your story and not theirs.

Life for those who couldn’t smile for those who forgot what a genuine smile is, love like there’s no other, hug like it’s your last one.

 I love you and send you hugs.

 You’re so strong, you’re still here, and I am proud of you. 

YOU ARE NOT USELESS. READ THAT AGAIN. 

YOU ARE WORTH IT. READ THAT AGAIN.

 YOU ARE LOVED. READ THAT AGAIN.

 I AM GLAD YOU EXIST. READ THAT AGAIN. 

YOU ARE NOT A PROBLEM. YOU ARE HUMAN AND YOUR FEELINGS ARE VALID. READ THAT AGAIN. 

YOU ARE NOT BEING DRAMATIC. 

You’re not a burden to anyone, don’t be afraid to talk, to use your voice. You’re beautiful inside out. Your body is beautiful the way it is. Please don’t starve yourself. Please eat, I know it’s hard but you deserve food. You deserve to eat and drink.

 I LOVE YOU SO MUCH. READ THAT AGAIN. I WISH I COULD HUG YOU RIGHT NOW, SO A VIRTUAL HUG WILL DO. 

It hurts me to see you’re in pain :( you deserve so much man, don’t let your emotions control you. Don’t let them get the best of you. I love u I love u I love u I love u I love u please don’t go. I am sorry that no one is hearing you, I am sorry no one is noticing that you have lost yourself. I wish I could take your pain away, it hurts me to see the pain in your eyes. I love you through my words and I mean it. I just want you to stay, hold on a little longer okay? Please? For Me.?? I hope you have an awesome day/ morning/ evening/ night. 

If it’s a night for you, go to sleep, I know it’s hard to fall asleep right now but you deserve a good sleep. If you have nightmares, please, don’t let them fight you. 

If it’s a day for you, don’t start it with such sad music, I know it’s impossible to have a good day with such a mindset but take baby steps, start by drinking two cups of water in the morning, and so on.. You will start building little healthy habits.

 If it’s an evening for you, you’re probably overwhelmed and stressed, I want you to know it’s okay to feel the way you feel. You don’t need to be scared, of course, you’re overwhelmed or stressed, I mean who wouldn’t? But it’s important to know that when you feel that way you should do a little self-care, such as taking a bath for example? You deserve to feel at ease and relaxed. And if you are somewhere in between I hope you know that you’re stronger than you think, I know you will make it :) 

Now wipe those tears away and smile for me, you really don’t know much a smile can brighten someone’s day, do you? I hope one day yours will become a genuine one where you don’t need to fake it anymore because I can’t say this enough, you deserve a good smile and to feel alive. You’re worth more than every fucking cent in this world.

 Remember crying is not weakness, let it out as much as you can but don’t let the emotion control you by giving up. It’s okay, you’re here, you’re safe, you can let it out. Did anyone ask you, how you are feeling today? If not, how are you really? I don’t think you’re doing good, but you will feel good at one point. Don’t give yourself up. I am sorry you feel misunderstood. But anyone who gets to be with you doesn’t know how lucky he/ she/ they are :). 

Enough with beating up yourself for today, okay?! - The stranger that cares about you more than anything. I hope this is enough for you to stay today, tomorrow will be a new day, a new start, let go now. I hope you can stay. This is your sign to stay and treat yourself with love, you deserve it. 

And in case no one told you today, again, I am so proud of you. I 

hope you will remember my words today tomorrow.

Hey, you, yes, I am talking right to you. I hope you know that you do only need yourself to be happy, I know society build up the standard that whenever you’re alone you’re not living a happy live. But in fact that is not true, if you start to realize that you actually deserve all the good things happening to you, you will treat yourself a lot  nicer. I hope you let yourself rest, don’t beat yourself up over past mistakes, over regret, and over everything your mind wants to destroy you. I wish I could remove all those demons inside of your head because you deserve to feel happy. If you ever feel lonely then watch the sky, because you know, someone, at the same time is watching the sky too, maybe feeling the same way..I am glad you exist and I hope you won’t ever remove your own spot in this world, maybe you don’t feel like you belong here but, Angel, then build your home here. I don’t want you to leave this world unhappy. I want you to live every little second, I want you to feel alive, I don’t want you to see yourself just existing. You deserve it. Whatever happened, it’s not your fault, the demons in your head recognize that you have a beautiful heart, they want to take it because they have never seen such beautiful heart as yours, so why let them win over you? . You’re not selfish for isolating yourself, but you deserve to talk to someone. If you’re reading this than please never forget to breath and smile. 



Don’t live up to other standards! It’s your story and not theirs. 





Life for those who couldn’t, smile for those who forgot what a genuine smile is, love like there’s no other, hug like its your last one. 



I love you and send you hugs.

You’re so strong, you’re still here, and I am proud of you. 





YOU ARE NOT USELESS. READ THAT AGAIN. 

YOU ARE WORTH IT. READ THAT AGAIN.

YOU ARE LOVED. READ THAT AGAIN.

I AM GLAD YOU EXIST. READ THAT AGAIN.

YOU ARE NOT A PROBLEM. YOU ARE HUMAN AND YOUR FEELINGS ARE VALID. READ THAT AGAIN.

YOU ARE NOT BEING DRAMATIC. 



You’re not a burden to anyone, don’t be afraid to talk, to use your voice. 



You’re beautiful inside out. Your body is beautiful the way it is. 



Please don’t starve yourself. Please eat, I know it’s hard but you deserve food. You deserve to eat and drink. 



I LOVE YOU SO MUCH. READ THAT AGAIN.



I WISH I COULD HUG YOU RIGHT NOW, SO A VIRTUAL HUG WILL DO.

I love u I love u I love u I love u I love u please don’t go.





I am sorry that no one is hearing you, I am sorry no one is noticing that you have lost yourself. I wish I could take your pain away, it hurts me to see the pain in your eyes.  I love you trough my words and I mean it. I just want you to stay, hold on a little longer okay? Please? For me.??



I hope you have an awesome day/ morning/ evening/ night. 



If it’s night for you, go to sleep, I know it’s hard to fall asleep right now but you deserve a good sleep. If you have nightmares, please, don’t let them fight you. 



If it’s day for you, don’t start it by such sad music, I know it’s impossible to have a good day with such mindset but take baby steps, start by drinking two cups of water in the morning and so on.. You will start building little healthy habits. 



If it’s evening for you, you’re probably overwhelmed and stressed, I want you to know it’s okay to feel the way you feel. You don’t need to be scared, of course you’re overwhelmed or stressed, I mean who wouldn’t? But it’s important to know that when you feel that way you should do a little self care, such as taking a bath for example? You deserve to feel at ease and relaxed.

And if you are somewhere in between I hope you know that you’re stronger than you think, I know you will make it :) 



Now wipe those tears away and smile for me, you really don’t know much a smile can brighten someone’s day, do you? I hope one day yours will become a genuine one where you don’t need to fake it anymore, because I can’t say this enough, you deserve a good smile and to feel alive. Did anyone asked you, how you are feeling today? If not, how are you really? I don’t think you’re doing good, but you will feel good at one point. Don’t give yourself up. 



I am sorry you feel misunderstood.



But anyone who gets to be with you, doesn’t know how fucking lucky he/ she/ they is :).



Enough with beating up yourself for today, okay?!



- The stranger that cares about you more than anything.

This is your sign to stay and treat yourself with love, you deserve it.



And in case no one told you today, again, I am so proud of you. 





I hope you will remember my words :)



Until tomorrow, my friend :)

Depression is NOT real !   
      



you might FEEL depressed but that's basically your body/mind telling you that there is something about your life you need to change.
you feel depressed probably cause you lead a depressing life !! anybody would probably be depressed in your situation;     

 i hear people on the internet say "i am depressed that's why i am lonely '' or..
                                                         "i am depressed that's why i am fat"  or...
                                                          "I am depressed that's why i am broke"

NO !!!!! IN REALITY  It's the otherway around !!!!

>you are lonely, that's why you are depressed <
>you are fat , that's why you are depressed <
>you are broke, that's why you are depressed <


The GOOD news is that ,this ''depressed" state is NOT a fatality. 
Now ,knowing all this , all you need to do is find the root problem and take action into solving it.
No need to pop pills! (phamaceutical companies feed off of "depressed" people who believe they need to take a miracle pill/drug to solve all the problems in their lives ) it all comes down to mindset.


So for exemple, if you 're fat, go to the gym and lose the weight. it's not gonna be easy !
But in life, nothing that is worthwhile is acquired easily. 
it always takes effort and discipline and sacrifice. 
But in the end you'll feel much better about yourself, and much less "depressed", because you finally ACHIEVED something. 

Happiness is not deserved ,it is EARNED.  
it is earned through achieving the goals that you've set for yourself.  
These goals may range from building a family with a loving wife, to losing weight, or landing your dream job, or becoming succesful, or having more friends. but all theses require to take action! 
Nothing good  comes  by accident. no one gets what he wants by accident.


A lot of our self-esteem is devired from our ACHIEVEMENTS (they could be anything ,little or big) especialy as a MAN!!

these days depression is been used as an one -size-fit-all excuse for not achieving anything and/or not doing shit!!

"OOH i couldn't study for my exam  because i'am depressed"
"OOH can't go to the gym because i am depressed"
"OOH I can't go out because i am depressed "
"OH I can't do this or that , because i am depressed ''

THATS BULLSHIT !!!! 

when you blame everything on depression ,you're essentialy saying that you've given up control overr your own life, and that you're not in controle of your own destiny anymore.
And that's the saddest part in my opinion.

A lot of this comes down (again) to your mindset . 
REMEMBER , your mind works for you !
if you constantly tell yourself that you are depressed , you mind will come up with all the reasons why you should be depressed.  And there goes the vicious cycle !

I HOPE THIS HELPS YOU  BUDDY!!!!

to the person reading this,

It’s been hard for you, I know, and it makes me sad that you don’t see yourself in the way I see you. Sometimes they are things in life that cause us to lose ourselves, and the way you have is so unimaginably painful. I miss your smile, the way your eyes light up the whole room just by the sound of your laughter. I miss the way you accepted the way you look in the mirror without cursing yourself out about how ugly you look. I miss the way you didn’t think of yourself as a failure because everyone makes mistakes, we all have flaws and we all aren’t perfect. It’s painful to see that no one around you seems to see the pain through your eyes, but, stranger, I do, I see how heavy your heart is and how comforting the sadness for you might be, how afraid your heart is of happiness because it disappears in the end, right? You don’t know how much impact you have in this world and it’s sad to see that your demons fight against you and want to take over you. Because you do make change, it’s something so simple and little that brightens up someone’s whole world, it can be a small smile from your lips, the way you look at things you’re passionate about, the way you make yourself eat even though it’s been hard for you lately, the way you zoom out and go in your own world, you brighten up my world by reading this, it means a lot to me that you’re here, existing, but I don’t want you to just exist, you deserve to feel alive. You deserve to get up in the morning and feel good about yourself. You deserve to feel something- to feel every damn second alive in this lifetime. It’s heartbreaking that you think you’re not capable of being loved, because you are, I love you through all my words and I hope you let it happen in your heart. Love is scary, I know, maybe your heart has been broken once and since then you wanted to be rather numb than feel ever again, it hurts me how you punish yourself, does it not deserve love? Because YOU DO deserve love, please forgive yourself, it’s not your fault that the demons want to take over your beautiful heart. You’re not a bad person for distancing yourself from others, but you deserve someone to talk to, you deserve someone to listen to. I am listening, you can tell me what’s wrong. It’s everything, isn’t it? There’s something pulling your heartstrings on the ground and no one seems to understand how misunderstood you feel. It's heartbreaking to know that I am behind the screen and can’t give you a hug, that’s why I will give you a big warm virtual hug and send you lots of love :). You matter. You are worthy. You are loved. You deserve good things. You deserve someone to listen to. You deserve to eat and drink. You deserve to feel good and alive. You deserve to smile. You deserve a hug. You deserve to be all the things you want to be, because you deserve to have and feel good things happening to you and have a fulfilled life. I know I might not know you personally but I care about you so much. I write this because I want you to stay here with me. I want you to hold on a little longer because you matter so much to me, because I will not let you give up on yourself. I want you to see that you should not give up on yourself because you DESERVE GOOD THINGS. I want you to look back on the time when you were a kid, you didn’t give up when you tried to swim for the first time, you didn’t give up when you tired to walk for the first time and fell, you never gave up on yourself, you always kept on pushing forwards, so why can’t you now? I know it’s tiring, you're mentally tired, but don't your younger self deserve good things? look back at your eyes that used to be full of hope, look back on those dreams. Don’t let yourself fall, you deserve better. We will both fight, I will fight for you. I won’t let those demons get to you. You can hold on to me, I won’t let you down :). Whenever you feel lonely, then look at the sky, I always look at it and think about you. Yes, you, because it makes me happy that there’s someone looking right back, maybe we can’t see each other but I can feel your presence here with me and that’s enough for me, because I am glad your heart is beating and you’re still fighting. You’re so much stronger than you think, you didn’t leave your spot on this earth even if you wanted to, you belong here, even though it doesn’t feel like it, when you don’t feel like belonging then build your own home here, put all your love in it and dreams. Think of you as a star when you feel alone, you shine because your heart is good, no matter what mistake you made, no matter about the past you had, you’re one of the stars that shine bright in the universe because you’re heart is beautiful, that’s why the demons in your mind wants to have it. As one of the stars you see other stars, maybe they have felt the same way as you do at some point in their life, but they lighten up the universe with each other’s presence. You’re a star for me, maybe you don’t see it yourself but I can see it, you’re beautiful from inside and out, your body is beautiful the way it is. You make me happy by reading this, you make me feel something by your presence and when you can make me feel that way then you also make other  people feel that way about you too. I hope you stay for yourself and don’t let your story get written by others but by yourself, it’s your story not theirs. As you can see, I say a lot of “I hope” because I have hope for you even if you don’t have it for yourself, I see hope in you even though you might want to give up. That’s why I hope you won’t see the world in darkness and will see it colorful again. I hope I will give you a glimpse of hope and make the world you see a bit colorful for today. My favorite color is yellow, and I hope the next time you see the color yellow you will think about my words. If someone left you then don’t blame yourself, don’t think you weren’t enough, don’t lower yourself for someone who couldn’t see the awesomeness in you. If you lost someone I am so sorry for your loss, they want you happy. I hope you don’t feel guilty or regret because you were there, you spent enough time with them, they want you to be happy. They are in a good and safe place now. If someone broke your heart then I am so sorry that they couldn’t see the way you look so beautiful because of the heart you have. Anyone who gets to be with you, doesn’t know how fucking lucky he/ she/ they is :). If you aren’t accepted at home or in general then I am so sorry that you have to deal with someone/ something you shouldn’t be ashamed of. I accept you and support you. I accept you as a human being no matter what race, religion, nationality, skin color, or sexuality you have. You’re safe here with me :). You’re not useless, you’re not a burden to anyone. You’re not a problem, you’re human and your feelings are valid. You’re not being dramatic. Please don’t starve yourself, you deserve food and to drink, I know it’s hard. It hurts to see that you’re in so much pain :( you deserve so much man, don’t let your emotions control you. Don’t let them get the best of you.  I am sorry no one is noticing, I wish /hope I could take your pain away for today or even for a moment while you’re reading this. If no one told you, I am so proud of you, you’re reading this and it’s enough for me to be proud of you because you’re here and that’s all that matters to me. If it’s night for you, go to sleep, I know it’s hard to fall asleep right now but you deserve a good sleep. If you have nightmares, please, don’t let them fight you. If it’s day for you, don’t start it with such sad music. I know it’s impossible to have a good day with such a mindset but take baby steps, start by drinking two cups of water everyday in the morning and so on.. You will start building little healthy habits. If it’s evening for you, you’re probably overwhelmed and stressed, I want you to know it’s okay to feel the way you feel. You don’t need to be scared, of course you’re overwhelmed or stressed, I mean who wouldn’t? But it’s important to know that when you feel that way you should do a little self care, such as taking a bath for example? You deserve to feel at ease and relaxed. 

And if you are somewhere in between I hope you know that you’re so strong for breathing despite the pain, I know you will make it :) I believe in you. All I want for you is to stay here, I really mean all my words, even if there are a lot of unsaid things I want to tell you and my text is getting longer and longer,I want you here. 



I hope one day your smile will become a genuine one where you don’t need to fake it anymore, because I can’t say this enough, you deserve a good smile and to feel alive. You’re worth more than every fucking cent in this world.



You can let go for today, I got you, you can cry your heart out as much as you want, but don’t let it tear you down and let your emotions control you by giving up. Crying is not a weakness. If you still feel alone I dedicate a song as your friend.

“Dusk till Dawn- Zayn feat. Sia (I prefer the slow version)” I hope you can think of me and will remind yourself of my words, I will for sure think of you. 



In case no one told you and you’re unsure yourself, you’re a good person and I am so happy you’re here. 



I hope this is enough to stay today, tomorrow will be a new day, a new start, let go now. Enough with beating yourself up for today, okay? 



Life for those who couldn’t, smile for those who forgot what a genuine smile is, love like there’s no other, hug like it's your last one. 



If you read all of it, until tomorrow my friend :)

I just wanna say, to anyone out there who are going through hard times. I was depressed for years, some time ago. The feeling of dread that claws at you, and you're just waiting for the climax to pop and drop and be over but it never comes. A bleakness draped the world in shades of grey that you get so used to seeing you forgot the world used to be so much more vibrant and alive. The desire to stay awake until dawn, for the impossible hope that maybe the night will stretch on forever and day would never come again. The drain that suck up all your feelings the moment you open your eyes to see the sun, a new aweful, dreadful day you fear and despise and just want to run away. The feeling of never being safe, of always being alone, of everything about you just seem to stand out and scream look at how aweful you are. Of fearing everyone, because how can they live so happily? Do they not see how terrible this world is? How do they do it? Am I the only one who doesn't know the rules? Is that why I'm like this? And then the months and years of wishing praying for an end, any end, so I won't have to feel like this anymore. I can't remember what happy is, it doesn't exist for me then. I got so used to it I really did gave up all hopes.

But then by a stroke of luck, or maybe I was just a stubborn idiot, I thought since I have no lingerings for the world, I can go whenever I want, so why not try and risk it all one last time for something I want to try? I want to have my life and make a choicr at least once. So I followed my dream and somehow, painful as it was, impossible as it appeared, despite how long it dragged into me scars that will never fade, I made it out. So I just want to say, I get a bit of it, whatever you may be feeling. I can't tell you how to get out, or get better, just that it will be so, so worth it. Desire change, so much you have to change for it, and I hope one day you'll wake up one morning like I did, with colours bursting from the blank ceiling in my dark room, feeling so light and hearing such peaceful silence for the first time in so long you burst into tears, feeling like you have just started living for the first time. It was the happiest moment in my life as of yet. It still wasn't easy afterwards, but I push on. It's so worth it. I'm grateful of those dark years too, they taught me the beauty of life and how I'm right where I should be. Happiness is within me, always with me all along.

I used to be like most of the people here. I wanted to die, cutting etc.

But,

One day my mom asked me to clean my room with her. So I did (my room looked like a hurricane just swept through it) and I found things that I didn't even know was in my room. I found more things of that kind and out of curiosity and boredom I started finding random things from unopened boxes and found things that were fun. And now, I have a purpose for living. Just by looking around my room I see purpose to live. I think "ugh I want to die" and I see the macrame keychain that I'm working on to give it to my mom on her birthday next month. I see the plants I bought from the nursery that are thriving and beautiful and thinking about all the effort I've put into my life I think again, "My die, when I can do all this?" And now I have purpose to live.

My life

Before I was born, my mom was raised and abused in the dirt slums of the Philippines, at the age of 16 she ran away to work at a bar, eventually my American dad who was in the navy met her they fell in love got married and saved her from a very bad place, life’s good. Tragically they found out my father has multiple sclerosis and if you don’t know what MS is basically it shuts down your nervous system and muscles so you can’t talk or walk so you’re just a vegetable on a bed with your mind running day and night and it has no cure. My dad has multiple sclerosis and as a little kid in the Philippines I was always confused staring at him thinking when will he be able to get out that bed to play catch with a football. I was born in North Carolina but raised in the Philippines most of my young child hood, living in a 3rd world country was fun but I saw a lot of traumatizing things. I’ve seen multiple deaths, poor naked dirty kids and old people on the streets selling necklaces made out of grass and flowers just so they can buy some rice. There’s isn’t a age restriction for buying alcohol or cigarettes and the mentaly disabled people were left on the streets to die and without meds they just went crazy and probably killed whenever they felt like it. Years past and we move to Jacksonville Florida and now my mom has a dick head bf who doesn’t give a fuck about us, he just needs a place to live and my mom needed someone to help pay bills. Now before you misunderstand me , I must say that I love my mom and she is my hero. She is tough and kind and I am grateful to have her in my life. But my mom likes to drink and so does her bf. Every week was a fight or argument. Eventually my mom gave up on me as a kid. But I tried to remain strong and humble. I have a love hate relationship with my mom because even though she was hard on me physically and mentally,  I understood that her life was hard especially dealing with my disabled father. I don’t think my mom ever said she loved me, in fact nobody has ever said that except some of my ex gf which I didn’t know how to take and would lead to an argument. As a teen I would either hide my self in a room playing video games or stay outside playing basketball, which led to me getting really good and playing basketball for my hs. In hs I was a reject sometimes bullied also being half Asian and white made it difficult, which would lead to a lot of fights. Eventually I matured and either made fun of them or just didn’t give a fuck about what they think or say, I was a quiet kid with a small circle. I was chill with some of the popular kids and other groups because I hated sticking to one crowd and accepted every personality and difference, Latinos, Asians, white, black, nerdy gamer, athlete , stoner, doesn’t matter I was chill with everyone but I never was a follower and I did my own thing. Some people saw me as weird and others saw me as a grown man taking care of myself and remaining humble. I had some girlfriends which made me happy but since it was hard for me to understand love, relationships were hard on me because it’s hard for me to open up and express myself, and takes even longer for me to trust and love someone. but just like everyone, break ups are hard and would lead to me not wanting to talk to girls for months. as a sophomore I started doing hard drugs, I must add that I was already smoking marijuana since the 5th grade but hs I was on xanax, percs, acid, jiggs, coke, lean etc. Basically anything except meth or heroin. So I started falling apart and just went to parties and hanging out with friends. My family never understood me and would just talk shit behind my back. Today I am 23 years old and still depressed but I would tell myself to toughen up and somebody somewhere has it worst then I do, thinking that’s what a father figure would say to his son,  that’s how my mind works since I never had a father figure, so I would think what would my dad have done. I look up to my father and would like to join the navy for a couple years just to make him happy. It’s been more than 30 years of him having MS and even though it’s not getting better I know his hearts strong and will live long like the king he is. I’m currently in online college and work but fuck a 9-5, don’t get it wrong I’m a hard worker and I hate to sound arrogant but my work ethic is crazy good and I don’t mind doing the same repetitive thing everyday. It’s just that I feel like I can’t work with someone telling me what to do, I need to be my own boss and do my own thing the way I need to. I’ve fought supervisors in different jobs several times after work.  But rn I’m just in college and working but also been on probation for the past two years from possession of marijuana and most recently a dui from driving while I was off hulk Xanax which if you don’t know are the strongest forms of Xanax. I’m just glad I didn’t crash or hurt anybody. I’m telling you my life because yes I’ve been through a lot and had suicidal thoughts. But the point is to tell yourself to get through the tough times and imagine yourself in a happier future wether it’s being rich or living off the grid living a simple life, for me I just want a family and to raise my kids right so they don’t ever have to deal with depression or anxiety like I did. I never had somebody to talk to and I don’t want my kids to think like that. I also want to start an organization that helps people, kids and adults with anxiety and depression. Thank you for reading and remember somebody out there loves you. 🖤

•	“Come to Me, all who are weary and heavy-laden, and I will give you rest”  - Jesus Christ

There is a street with a retirement home on the one side, and a kindergarten on the opposite side. The speed limit is 40 km/h. You speed down that road going 120 km/h and get caught by a law enforcement officer. 
The next day you are in court trying to defend yourself. You tell the Judge ‘’Im sorry I will never do it again’’ to which he replies ‘’by keeping the law in the future does not make up for breaking it in the past. There is a penalty that needs to be paid. If I let you go now, the penalty will be unpaid and no justice would be served.’’
The penalty he gives you is massive – you cant pay it because you don’t have that kind of money. You go to prison. Later that night, your 1stnight in prison, the warden comes and open your cell door  telling you that you are free to go. Someone paid your fine. Will you accept the payment or will you remain in ‘’prison’’?
You asked the prison warden ‘’who paid my fine?’’. He says some guy went and sold all he has in order to pay your penalty. You say ‘’cool thanks, I don’t even know the guy’’.
What would you do next?
1.	Climb into your car and drive down that very street again @ 120 km/h, knowing or assuming this stranger will pay your penalty again because he might have some other stuff to sell to bail you out again?
2.	Try and find out who this person is and get to know him and thank him for what he has done. Also not to do what you did that caused you to land up in prison because it cost this person who paid your penalty a lot – He made a massive sacrifice for you.


If the fine was $ 100 000 000 and you took out a loan to pay the penalty (hypothetically speaking), you would still be & 100 000 000 in debt.
Only someone without debt can pay your debt. Jesus was without sin.


Adam and Eve were naked in the garden before eating the forbidden fruit. They did not notice anything strange of their nakedness – to them it was normal. Once they ate of the forbidden fruit, their eyes opened to their sinfulness – they disobeyed God and realized they were naked. 


‘’  The woman saw that the tree was good for food and delightful to look at, and that it was desirable for obtaining wisdom. So she took some of its fruit and ate it; she also gave some to her husband, who was with her, and he ate it. 7 Then the eyes of both of them were opened, and they knew they were naked; so they sewed fig leaves together and made coverings for themselves. ’’ Genesis 3:6-7


The fig leaves they sewed together can also be seen as ‘’self righteous works’’ to cover up their sin – the fig leaves won’t last forever as they will dry out and wither, exposing their nakedness again. God provided proper clothing for them to cover their nakedness properly……..


‘’The LORD God made clothing from skins for the man and his wife, and he clothed them. ‘’ Genesis 3:21


This is the 1st time anything died / was killed. It was killed so that the skin of the animal could be used as clothing for the 2 naked people instead of them using leaves.
During Passover the Jews had to sacrifice a lamb each year to atone for their sins. The lamb had to be spotless and without blemish.
Jesus is called THE LAMB OF GOD as He was without sin, YET HE was slaughtered so that his BLOOD could cover our sins. Our good works (fig leaves) wont do.


*For you are saved by grace through faith, and this is not from yourselves; it is God’s gift—9 not from works, so that no one can boast* Paul Ephesians 2:8-9


*And just as it is appointed for people to die once—and after this, judgment—28 so also Christ, having been offered once to bear the sins of many, will appear a second time, not to bear sin, but to bring salvation to those who are waiting for him* Heb 2:14–15


*According to the law almost everything is purified with blood, and without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness* Hebrews 9:22

Hey, you.

Yes, you.

You need to know.

DON'T SCROLL, please..

I know, I know I'm a stranger here on the internet.

But, I guarantee you, you need to hear this.

Are you in a dark place?

You aren't alone.

We all were there, y'know.

Feeling Suicidal?

Please don't.

I think you matter.

Even if I don't know you, I still think you matter.

You are the best stranger I've met.

It's quick, I promise.

Drink some water.

WAIT! DON'T WIPE THE WATER OFF YOUR LIPS YET!

Look, see how they shine?

See how they twinkle and glimmer?

it's like you.

Even in the tiniest bit of light, you shine.

Out of the 7 billion+ people on this earth..

Someone out there, they think you're perfect.

They love you, so much.

Imagine how much you'd hurt them if you left..

even if it seems unlikely, I can assure you.

Someone out there, they love you.

You'll win, no matter how hard it is.

HEY YOU! Yes, you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. I was bullied for so long and was told that I wasn't beautiful, and it broke me down. But I realized that I am beautiful and so is everyone else. I wanted to make sure no one felt upset like I did - hating myself and crying to sleep. You are all special <3

I used to be a person who never really cared about much and didn't think too much about something. So when I started dealing with a problem that terrified and confused me I didn't really do much about it, I didn't tell anyone about it, I just let it pass. And it did eventually but then a couple of years after it came back stronger than before and I didn't really know what to do. I told my best friend but it got worse. I wasn't really sure what to do and before I knew it I got nightmares that tore my heart apart. That was when I actually started thinking about everything properly. I told someone I trusted and I also told them that no matter what that I would never tell my mum cause she would never understand. That same night she called my mum and my mum said that everything would be ok. But how could she know she didn't know what I was going through. I never told anyone else except my best friend cause she has never told anyone about it and when she checks up on me she makes sure we have distanced ourselves from everyone. But then I decided that if I was gone then everyone would live a better life so I started thinking about suicide. And I try to distance my self from everyone else including my best friend so then when I do finally kill myself no one would really care. 
It's not easy. Everyone keeps saying that I'm changing.
My friends: did you even hear what I said. Omdssss your sooooooooo annoying can you even listen for once not everything is about you.

My best friend: always know I'm here for you and I'm not leaving ever just let me know when you're ready to talk

I only changed to save them so they could live their best life without me.
I'm a danger to everyone who crosses my path.
I am so sorry to everyone who I've hurt but you won't have to deal with me for much longer.
Bye to everyone who I know or thought I knew.

God is calling out to you. You who have wanted to believe but keep being bombarded by the lies of the enemy all around you. That God isn’t real. That God doesn’t love you. That God wouldn’t choose you or speak to you like He does to so many. 

But Jesus is knocking on the door of your heart bc He wants to save you from that emptiness you feel. From that lifestyle filled with emptiness/depression/never feeling good enough/etc and all that you tell yourself is normal. 

I was depressed, had eating disorders, self harmed, got wrongfully suspended from college, and I thought I was going to live empty/numb for the rest of my life. As long as it would be. As long as I could handle living this way. But Jesus came and did the impossible and absolutely changed my life. I had heard of Jesus before when I was small, but I never took God seriously. I kept trying to fight for me with my own hands until I was so exhausted of hoping. Until everything ended up destroyed. My future. Parent’s expectations of me. I was lost and felt so alone. Like no one could understand me or help me. Like no one cared. But Jesus came and didn’t shame me and I stopped fighting Him. I gave Him a chance though I didn’t deserve it and He changed everything. This isn’t religion. It’s a relationship. Religion is filled with dead tradition and rules impossible to follow, but God works in you like a Good Father. He heals you, strengthens you, fixes all that is broken and destroyed and rebuilds it in a way you could never imagine.

I’ve uploaded part of my testimony for those interested. Just know that this is not a coincidence. God is knocking bc there is life out of this cycle you’ve fallen in. There is. 

There is power in prayer in Jesus’ name. Jesus can save you and change everything for you all you gotta do is accept Him in your heart by confessing your sins to Him in your room and believing. I dared to believe and I’ve never been happier! God bless.

with everything in me.

Love through me.

 In Jesus’ name I pray. Amen."

I'm 50 years old and I hope that my wisdom might help someone, even just one person and it will be worth it. You are young now and it feels like being part of a group or being "popular" is important. You think that if you don't have a boyfriend or girlfriend you have failed. I urge you to spend your lonely years, your single years getting to know the most important person you will ever meet.....yourself. You will live with yourself forever and If you take the time to perfect who you are, to love who you are then you will be rich in ways others cant dream of for the rest of your life. In time after you have perfected who you are and you gain a certain quiet wisdom about life and your soul, you will attract others, you will be seen, you will not be invisible. Do not give up! use every day as a gift to sharpen the sword that is your soul, to become a master of your own life. Good luck young ones...be calm, patient and resolute in all you do and you will own what will be your world.

100 Reasons to stay alive...
1. We would miss you.


2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.


3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow.


4. There's so much you would miss out on doing.


5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there.


6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself.


7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise.


8. You are amazing.

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better.


10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead.


11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive.

HEY YOU! Yes, you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. I was bullied for so long and was told that I wasn't beautiful, and it broke me down. But I realized that I am beautiful and so is everyone else. HEY YOU! Yes, you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. SACRIFICE.❤️         A  Poem About Letting Go Of The
                             Special Person in your life.

Adrift in a raging sea of emotions, on a voyage to nowhere.
On  the horizon, to my rescue, a distant saviour approaches,
The sea calms in her wake,
 Her calmness becomes my calm.

A lifeline thrown, a steady hand on the tiller,
We sail together towards tranquil waters,
A life saved, 
A life indebted.

The contents of her thoughts laid out In  orderly rows,
Suddenly, & without warning, a whirling dervish invades,
Scattering the order, creating unwanted disorder. 
The pureness of her thoughts coated with  detritus.

One life ascending, one life decending,
The Yin & Yang of life
One life lived, 
One life, a delicate orchid yet still to bloom.

To  ensure  its longevity, 
The bloom craves care & nurturing
A calm, protective atmosphere will ensure her success.
Without  distracting my friend from her chosen path.

                             oooooooooooooooo

1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing.

Depression, been there. You’re not doing it for attention it’s just stress building up inside you, parents not giving one shit about you, friends talking behind your back and sharing secrets that aren’t secret anymore, and you just want the pain to stop, I get it. Here’s what I did, I didn’t take stress relievers but just thought of positive things that made stress go away. I went up to my parents and made them take me to my aunt’s that actually give a shit about me. If they didn’t I will go to my aunts’ house and live there. Toxic relationships with loved ones is bad and will manipulate, abuse/bully—cyber-bullying, or anything at all is bad and I had that toxic relationship with my parents. It’s bad so I said “I don’t need you.” and walked away. You matter and I don’t think suicide is the answer or solution at all. If you need somebody to talk to then I’m here, I’ll try and help you! :)

I'm sorry you're going through it bby, I'm sure you're tired :( But that's okay, it's normal and nothing to invalidate nor feel bad about. Maybe it's the pressure of keeping up with school, maybe it's anxiety or depression or something else, but whatever the case may be, please know that everything will go back to normal. It may be a bumpy road back to normal, but it's a road nonetheless. Also, please stay. No matter how hard things get, please stay. 💜
~

Babes, it's alright. There's most likely a reason as to you doing so, and it's alright. If works stressing ya out, you should take a quick break, maybe get some snacks and definitely water, play some music or comfort videos and get back to work. You got this. 💖
~

To all having depression: 





I know it’s hard, a lot of people go through this. It’s uncommon, but many people without support or social activity leads to depression. 

I lost my grandma near Christmas, we all have our losses. Pets, loved ones, they are still in your heart, if you hurt. Tears might be bleeding from your eyes when you think about lost loved ones.

Either a sacrifice in war, or dying of a sickness or accident. Humans can be cruel, or kind. 

Mother Earth is our life source, she provides food and water and we trash her, 

Just remember your depression will go away one day, it will never stay forever. 

Never think of killing yourself, you have a long life to live if your a teen. Killing yourself hurts others, 

In Roblox we had a few people that hung themselves because of their hard lives. 

Just make sure, someone is always there for you. No matter where you go, or what you do. Whatever situation, whenever and always.

Reasons to live: 



It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.
It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow.
There's so much you would miss out on doing.
There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there.
So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself.
You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise.
You are amazing.
A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better.
What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead.
I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive.
You won't be able to listen to music if you die.
Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about.
There are so many people that would miss you, including me.
You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born.
How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died?
You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect.
Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again...
You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day
Listening to incredibly loud music

Not being alive is really bad.

When I was smaller I had a lot of conflicts with my little sister she had anger issues and she would find anything to fight me, she would always physically fight with me, she threw things at me, she hit me repeatedly, and it got so bad my cousin and brother had to interfere and pull her off of me or put her in another room sometimes when she fought me I had to run outside to breathe, I couldn't breathe I felt like I was suffocating. I was also at fault I did fight back sometimes but not always, I would defend myself and talk back but I was fed up with the pain she caused mentally and physically she made me insecure she told me she hates me and that I was fat, ugly, a mistake, a disappointment, a disgrace to my family, she even went so far to tell me to die and that I should kill myself...she was in 2nd grade she was around 7 years old when this all occurred. At around 9 years old I was already suffering I am currently 14 years old I'm in 9th grade and my sister is in 7th grade(12 years old) . I'm just... I'm done I just need everything to stop I am sooo done with everything the fact that some of my family members constantly fat shame me to the point I am currently not eating properly and starve myself so they can stop commenting on my weight and making me feel horrible about myself. I hate myself all the things I have endured and all the pain i am going througmade me hate myself and I am never going to forget the pain,tears,blood, and suffering I went through. I have deep emotions and a negative mind that sometimes I don't feel like myself I feel miserable and lonely and I dont know how to express how I'm feeling and how I'm doing in person. I've lost motivation to do the things that I love I lost motivation to do anything. Kind sucks when you have people tell you that when  you’re young it’s the best time to be alive...but you think “I’m not alive. I’m just existing”  so you’re stuck in a constant state of existential dread, and the only reason you exist is to please someone else...and that someone else keeps saying that “life is good at your age” and you say “no it’s not” and they straight up deny it as though they know what it’s like to live in your head and they think they’re helping but they’re really just ruining the little hope you have left for the future. They say they understand and that “life is tough for everyone right now” and “covid is making a lot of people suffer mentally and socially” but you’ve been this way for years and years and you’ve even told them but they seem to not recognize it so they can push the blame onto a  tangible thing to not accept that your brain is fucked up. Because “oh no no no my child could never have felt this way since elementary school! That would mean there isn’t an external factor making them depressed! They’re own mind can’t just be that way” 

But you’re just thinking “there is no reason I’m the way I am. I just am.” But they don’t get it and they try to act like the understand but they don’t. They say that you can be unhappy and not lose your joy as they are not one in the same. But you’ve lost your joy, happiness, and motivation to keep going through life. They don’t get that you don’t see a reason for anything. They get angry because you don’t do your daily tasks but you feel no need for it. We’re gonna die anyways. What’s the point? What’s the point of a school thag teaches me nothing? When will I ever need these skills? I won’t. Why should I sit all day in a situation that makes me feel like the walls are closing in on me when I get nothing out of it? Why should I go back to school in person? Especially when I told you that I’m scared of that place. I told you that I was on the brink of hyperventilation at my last exam, not even because of the exam because I knew I’d pass. It was because I was in a building that suffocates me. I had forgotten how much it hurt to be at that school over quarantine and now you want me to go back? When I’ve told you how much pain it causes me? You want to sacrifice my health for a damn letter on a piece of paper that says I’m worthy of a future? Fuck that. I finally have some consistency in life and you want to strip that away and push me back into the hell hole that makes me want to jump off roof? I understand you want me to do well in what you think is important but I’m dying inside and all you care about are my grades. I feel so insignificant because every conversation we have is about school and assignments and grades. Is that all I am to you? A last chance at a successful child? A grade? A prize? You don’t fucking see me. You see an opportunity to brag to yo ur friends about your successful children. But but don’t worry just look over my adult brothers living in our house. Just focus on your trophy- I mean daughter.
