Hey.



Hey, you.



Yes, you.



You're the one reading this, aren't you?



Well, let me tell you something.



You need to know.



DON'T SCROLL, please..



I know, I know I'm a stranger here on the internet.



But, I guarantee you, you need to hear this.



Are you in a dark place?



You aren't alone.



We all were there, y'know.



Feeling Suicidal?



Please don't.



I think you matter.



Even if I don't know you, I still think you matter.



You are the best stranger I've met.



So, do something for me real quick.



It's quick, I promise.



Drink some water.



WAIT! DON'T WIPE THE WATER OFF YOUR LIPS YET!



Look, see how they shine?



See how they twinkle and glimmer?



it's like you.



Even in the tiniest bit of light, you shine.



If you want to take your life, think about something.



Out of the 7 billion+ people on this earth..



Someone out there, they think you're perfect.



They love you, so much.



Imagine how much you'd hurt them if you left..



even if it seems unlikely, I can assure you.



Someone out there, they love you.

DEPRESSION (DARKNESS)  - A POEM
O how I dispise you, youre Invisible to family & friends
You hurt those we love, but ignore our enemies
You creep up on us when we're sad, when we're feeling down
You tell us 'retreat within ourselves', it will help us mend
In truth, you want  to take us on your journey to dispair

I know we've had many battles, I know you, I'll expose you
I'll name you so I can shame you, I will call you DARKNESS
Today you have taken my friend from me
For that I will haunt YOU until eternity
Next time, when I  see DARKNESS on the horizon
Next time, if there is a next time I will be ready for you!

A Poem by Random Act Of Kindness.

Hey..iam megan probably no one is gonna read this but iam gonna talk about my experience 

The first time noticing i was depress.
....When I was 10 years old i found out I was depressed after my doctor told me ..After that day, i never really thought about it and thought it's just a small thing until i started growing and growing it becomes difficult for me to handle and starting to develop anxiety and eating disorder... I have eating disorder not because I wanted to be skinny...not bcs i don't like to eat in fact I love food alot... It's to punish myself for not being a good sibling and if I ever got scolded i would use that as a reason to starve myself. At 10/9/2018 in my bedroom, it was my birthday..after my birthday i went in my room, grab a blade and tried ending my life but I couldn't i was trembling and i was breathing heavily , i ended up putting a blade aside and think maybe next time...
      On 13 December 2018,Morning i was staying with my sibling in my parents room until i heard my parents argue ,i was use to it so I just close the door and hoping  we don't get beaten .After the fight ,it all went silent until i heard footstep coming up the stairs into my parents room...it was my mother she was angry and came up to me with my diary in her hand she said to me how bloody dare you too write those things...turns out my father found my diary and read it he thought if mother saw this they will talk things out but no instead she lashes out scolding him and saying that I was talking bs..After that day i decided to throw all my diary and keep all the f up things to myself instead of talking to someone...One day me and my family went to the mall ..i started feeling unease and thought are they my parents and siblings or are they just strangers...then i snapped and said to myself what the hell was i thinking and after heading to the mall i decided to google why do I think my family are strangers and i found out I have DDD disorder() i was so upset thinking why didn't I healed why am I like this...that's when I decided to cut connection with friends and family all i did is sleep ,staying in bed and i only come out is to eat a little but never once have I sat down with my family all together eat just me alone eating left overs at night...
       At 20 december 2019 my parents decided to split up i didn't make a big deal about it bcs i knew one day that day will happen and all of us decided to stay at my mother side..we moved out at 1 January 2019 those 3 months was doing fine i guess we were happy again that's what I thought untill mother  start chasing for father and my father gave in and live with us ..that's when it happen again the fights but this time it was different my mother was drunk she started telling at him and kicking him saying those 3 months was fine without him you could have just left...It left me all confused think wasn't mother the one chasing him...that's when I decided to not side with my mother or father i decided to side with my siblings they were the one that at least know what i have been through...
        December 31 2020 i tried to killing myself by straggling myself but it didn't work out...i tried doing it again but I keep holding myself up so I decided to do it when I was an adult so I could just live and die in my own house instead of my family house....
        Until one day something changed my whole entire life my father decided all except my mother to all go hiking i didn't wanted to go at first but i give in bcs my sibling wanted to go ...the first day wasn't the best my muscle was sore and i was tired but it makes me wanna go more i don't know why but I just like the feeling of being free so, i went there again and again until that's when I don't feel difficult physical and mentally and i felt relaxed and i feel like a human again .. i was happy... Happy bcs i made it... I feel alive again i cried that night saying to myself i made it... The next day i decided to eat a full meal i went out my room with my parent and sibling on the table i got my fork and knife and ate french toast and sausage ngl it was yummy ..At night i slept well it felt nice waking up again...

That's my story and yes I made it out now iam 14 years old  just wanna tell you it's possible to get out of depression but all you need is efforts it may be hard but the more you work hard the more worthy it is ,sorry if my story suddenly was long and out off the subject and also if u need help here are the suicide hotlines u can call:(in the comment)

Hey Everyone, please take the time to read. I just want to let you know that, sadness isn’t something that you can get over. Having these thoughts that always keep you down even when you think your happy. Being sad isn’t a bad thing. It just means your feeling emotions. You can feel sad even if your life is great and nothing wrong. Even the happiest people can feel the baddest emotions. Being happy,sad,mad,confused,scared,normal,etc. I’ve always felt like I was sad and ima be honest with you, I still am.Sadness doesn’t even stop until you make it stop. I’m still having trouble when I think about the future and that I might die right now. I could die in one hour. I could die in one second. I don’t know. That’s what I life is. Life can’t give you all that answers you want. The on,t thing that can help you, is you. You don’t try and forget your mistakes, you look back and fix them. God made us to face the challenges that come with life. Life isn’t a place where everybody,everyone,everything, is perfect. If you don’t like the road your walking, make another one. You are the artist of YOUR life, don’t give that paintbrush to anyone else. Rose above your problems and find the answers.mildew is like a storm. A storm can be the worst one ever. And only the strongest people get through it. A storm doesn’t stay forever, it leaves. And after it leaves things can be broken. That’s fine. That great actually. You build the new city’s,states etc. after a storm, the sun shines the brightest. I personally love that feeling. The warm sun shining but a cold breeze. I just want you to know, I’m here. I’m always gonna be here. Maybe not physically but mentally ALWAYS. You may have clipped wings, but tomorrow you will have wings that shine brighter then any future. I love you and I will never stop. Your friends aren’t friends with you for no reason.

100 reasons to stay alive: 
1. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.
2. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow.
3. There's so much you would miss out on doing.
4. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there.
5. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself.
6. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise.
7. You are amazing.
8. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better.
9. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead.
10. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive.
11. You won't be able to listen to music if you die.
12. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about.
13. There are so many people that would miss you, including me.
14. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born.
15. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died?
16. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect.
17. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again...
18. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day
19. Listening to incredibly loud music
20. Being alive is just really good.
21. Not being alive is really bad.
22. Finding your soulmate.
23. Red pandas
24. Going to diners at three in the morning.
25. Really soft pillows.
26. Eating pizza in New York City.
27. Proving people wrong with your success.
28. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life.
29. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can.
30. Being able to help other people.
31. Bonfires.
32. Sitting on rooftops.
33. Seeing every single country in the world.
34. Going on roadtrips.
35. You might win the lottery someday.
36. Listening to music on a record player.
37. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower.
38. Taking really cool pictures.
39. Literally meeting thousands of new people.
40. Hearing crazy stories.
41. Telling crazy stories.
42. Eating ice cream on a hot day.
43. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know.
44. Travelling to another planet someday.
45. Having an underwater house.
46. Randomly running into your hero on the street.
47. Having your own room at a fancy hotel.
48. Trampolines.
49. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again.
50. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke,
51. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more.
52. People do care.
53. Treehouses
54. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees
56. I don't even know you and I love you.
57. I don't even know you and I care about you.
58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness!
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor.
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS!
61. Starbucks.
62. Hugs.
63. Stargazing.
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is.
65. You've changed somebody's life.
66. Now you could change the world.
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you.
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you.
69. You have the chance to save somebody's life.
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things.
71. Making snow angels.
72. Making snowmen.
73. Snowball fights.
74. Life is what you make of it.
75. Everybody has a talent.
76. Laughing until you cry.
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy.
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist.
79. Its possible to turn frowns, upside down
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive.
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero.
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections.
83. One day your smile will be real.
84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day.
85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds.
86. Getting completely smashed with your best friends.
87. Eating crazy food.
88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one.
89. Sleeping in all day.

91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud you didn't commit
92. Being able to meet your Internet friends.
93. Tea / Coffee / Hot Chocolate

95. Cuddling under the stars.
96. Being stupid in public because you just can.
97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile?
98. being able to hug that one person you havent seen in years
99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this.

So...I know maybe it's not the right place to write this and nobody will see it but I just wanna say this and somehow try to forget even tho it's impossible. I was never the kind of person who is talkative or easy makes friends but the fact that classmates bullied me from such a young age made me develop anxiety and that fear of talkting cuz I'd say something wrong bc I'm so emotional. I had several problems with bullyinh since 3rd grade and when I moved to another school in 5rd grade I hoped people will see me differently even tho I had no idea what's wrong with me or why can't I make friends. There was this guy who never bullied me or talked to me different than he talks to other people that made me fall in love with him since 4rd grade (tho I can say in 4rd grade was more admiration) but when I found out that he'll be with me 4 years in 5-8 I was so happy even tho he didn't know me very well I still wanted to be with him. In 5rd grade, he ignored me and clearly loved another girl and even had a relationship but none of this stopped me from liking him and I told him (before having a girlfriend) that I do like him. Still, he ignored me 3 months and then said to me that we're better friends so I just wanted to be by his side, not really a relationship cuz I knew I wasn't worth it. Then in 6rd grade we started talking more but he started somehow be cold and that year started the worst bullying for me so I got depressed... I used to cry all nights cuz on a day I had to put a mask of happiness.. I used to cut my hands cuz I felt like I'm worth the pain. I wanted to disappear and didn't even think about school till I got in 8rd grade. Yea, 6rd grade and 7rd grade were the worst for me bc of bullying and that guy. I had really low grades and felt like "Ah, I can't even be good at  something..." or "I'm so ugly and that's why no one likes me" or "I'm so weird, gross, a failure, good for nothing and I disappoint my parents which I don't deserve." So I started seeing myself so bad, like I was nothing but a garbage, like I didn't deserve life and felt like I'm losing pieces of me, like I'm losing myself in this whole thing. I was angry and say everytime and worried my parents and even tho I was happy they care, I didn't wanna show that. In 8rd grade it got better cuz I had a friend by my side and even tho the whole class against me, it didn't matter cuz I had her. I got to be with the guy I liked in a relationship in 7rd grade but he used to forget about me for months and be with other girls, and I saw him and thought "He looks happier than when he's with me" but eventually he always came back cuz I texted him and everything, gave him a lot of chances.. Now, after 2 years of being together when he ignored me a lot and made me jealous everytime and made me feel so alone still I thought I have him, he broke me again...today. Even tho I knew this won't last and I knew he has another girl cuz he's wasn't seeing me, texting me, calling me, he practically forgot about me after going to highschool. What hurts me the most is that he gave me hope, I wasn't capable of letting him go... even tho I saw he doesb't care about me or love me anymore if he ever had, everytime I told him that, he just created excuses so I believed him. I worried for months for him, I wanted to kill myself many times and lost a lot of people in this process.. Today I saw him with that girl and thought "ah... He never went out with me but with that girl he did and even bought her a present...". I know it's normal to lose people but this broke me more than I had ever expected and I feel like I lost a piece of me. 
I care too fucking much... 
I love too fucking much...
And I consume myself too fucking much and I did everything for him so that in the end I'd be alone, after I even had lost someone from my family. I don't know if I 'll ever be a normal person, smiling, laughing, having friends and not worrying. Poem of my Life
---------------------------

Everything,
it will end sooner or later.
Nothing can change that.
This world? It'll end.
Human kind? It will end.
-------------------------------------

Everything goes to waste sooner or later,
you put your time, money,
and everything you have into something.
But in a few days, weeks, or years..
It will all end.
So in life, you either move on, or you give up.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You fight till the end, until you lose a leg, an arm.
Your best friends... they will say goodbye.
Friends... they will say goodbye.
But always remember.
Your family, will always be there.
Even me, who you probably don't know.

You need to know.

Are you in a dark place?



You aren't alone.



We all were there, y'know.



Feeling Suicidal?



Please don't.



I think you matter.



Even if I don't know you, I still think you matter.



You are the best stranger I've met.

It's quick, I promise.



Drink some water.



WAIT! DON'T WIPE THE WATER OFF YOUR LIPS YET!



Look, see how they shine?



See how they twinkle and glimmer?



it's like you.



Even in the tiniest bit of light, you shine.



If you want to take your life, think about something.



Out of the 7 billion+ people on this earth..



Someone out there, they think you're perfect.



They love you, so much.



Imagine how much you'd hurt them if you left..



even if it seems unlikely, I can assure you.



Someone out there, they love you.



So keep fighting.



You'll win, no matter how hard it is.







"Fight the storm to see the rainbow". Remember that, okay?



Good, I love you.



Stay safe, handsome/beautiful :)

100 Reasons why you shouldn't commit suicide.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself, if you failed or just simply left scars or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not, it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favorite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music 
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. 
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. 
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. 
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. 
35. Going on road trips. 
36. You might win the lottery someday. 
37. Listening to music on a record player. 
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 
39. Taking really cool pictures. 
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories. 
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 
44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 
45. Traveling to another planet someday. 
46. Having an underwater house. 
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 
49. Trampolines. 
50. Think about your favorite movie, you'll never watch it again. 
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses 
55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 
56. I don't even know you and I love you. 
57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 
58. Nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE 
61. Starbucks. 
62. Hugs. 
63. Stargazing. 
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. You could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 
69. You have the chance to save somebody's life. 
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has talent. 
76. Laughing until you cry. 
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 
79. It's possible to turn frowns, upside down 
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive. 
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 
83. One day your smile will be real. 
84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 
85. Lying on the grass and laughing at the clouds. 
86. Getting completely smashed with your best friends. 
87. Eating crazy food. 
88. Staying up all night watching your favorite films with a loved one. 
89. Sleeping in all day. 
90. Creating something you're proud of. 
91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and be proud you didn't commit suicide.
92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 
93. Tea / Coffee / Hot Chocolate 
94. The new season of Sherlock
95. Cuddling under the stars. 
96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 
97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 
98. Being able to hug that one person you haven't seen in years 
99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 
100. But, the final and most important one is, just, being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, anything could happen.

Living with depression has been a struggle for me I've gone through it my whole life, I started by laughing it off, pretending I didn't care what was happening around me, people in my life kept dying I lost friends, family, lovers...I bottled it up, once those thoughts started ruminating I couldn't stop, I believed in all the bad things people said about me growing up, that I was destined to be a sufferer and here I am, a chronic suffer of depression, anxiety, inferiority, loneliness and sadness...I almost killed myself 2 weeks ago...so...

I just want to say...

...that I want anyone who reads this to know, you are not destined for sadness, you are NOT as bad as you think you are, you and anyone who sees this, no matter what people say to you, you are allowed to be sad, you are allowed to be depressed, you are NOT weak, even if you cry, you ARE strong because you feel and your letting yourself feel

Even if your alone right now and have nobody to hold you I want you to keep going, because you deserve to be happy, some days will be bad...really bad...but I promise the good days will get better, as long as you can pick yourself up and keep going, appreciate everything you have even no matter how small, your eyes...your nose...your cheeks...your lips...

I know there are some bad people in the world and bad things are happening to us all right now, but...I want you to keep going, one day you'll find someone, a friend a lover or even a pet that makes the days brighter someone who cares about you...

If you read this, just know whoever you are I care about you, and I want you to be happy, even if it takes you days, weeks, months, even years and the illness of depression doesn't fade...you'll get there as long as you keep going, and when you do you'll be so happy you did it...I'm proud of you all for getting so far in life because you ARE strong remember that, you ARE strong and you CAN do this, don't let depression win, as long as you keep picking yourself up after a fall...it will never win...

Reasons why you should stay alive.



1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead.

HEY YOU! Yes, you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. I was bullied for so long and was told that I wasn't beautiful, and it broke me down. But I realized that I am beautiful and so is everyone else. I wanted to make sure no one felt upset like I did - hating myself and crying to sleep. You are all special <3

little girl: what’s on your arm?

me: they’re battle scars.

little girl: you fought in a war?

me: yeah. a long and hard one.

little girl: that’s so cool! can i get one?

me: no. please do not ever get any. but i’ll tell you what. whenever you see someone else with battle scars, i want you to hug them. okay? can you promise me?

little girl: yes. i promise.



a few days later we went on a short shopping spree. suddenly the little girl let go of my hand and ran up to another random teenager



teen: why are you hugging me?

little girl: because.. (*points*) you have battle scars just like my babysitter.



the teen looked up at me, and i rolled up my sleeves to show her. with tears in her eyes, she said one thing to me..



teen: my war is far from being finished right now, but i am not done fighting.



she bends down at eye level with the little girl



teen: thanks for giving me the strength to keep. you are forever my war hero.



⚠️ this is not my story, but i saw it somewhere else and decided to share it too because i want you to do the same to anyone with “battle scars” ⚠️

Reasons why you should stay alive.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect.

Little Girl: What’s on your arm? 
Me: They’re battle scars. 
Little Girl: You fought in a war? 
Me: Yeah. A long and hard one. 
Little Girl: That’s so cool! Can I get one? 
Me: No. Please do not ever get any. But I’ll tell you what. Whenever you see someone else with battle scars, I want you to hug them, okay? Can you promise me? 
Little Girl: Yes. I promise. 
A few days later we went on a short shopping spree. Suddenly the little girl let go of my hand and ran up to another random teenager.
Teen: Why are you hugging me?
Little Girl: Because... (*points*) you have battle scars just like my babysitter.
The teen looked up at me, and I rolled up my sleeves to show her.
With tears in her eyes, she said one thing to me...
Teen: My war is far from being finished yet, but I’m not done fighting.
She bends down at eye level with the little girl
Teen: Thanks for giving me the strength to keep fighting. You are forever my war hero.
Notes: this is not my story I made, but everyone’s. I want you guys to do the same to anyone with “battle scars”.

100 Reasons Why You Should Stay Alive 

1. Your friends, your family, and your pets would miss you.

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Platonically. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 

13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 

14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 

15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 

16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 

17. You're gorgeous, amazing, handsome, and to someone you are perfect. 

18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 

19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day. 

20. Listening to incredibly loud music.

21. Being alive is just really good. 

22. Not being alive is really bad. And boring.

23. Finding your soulmate. 

24. Red pandas. Just… THEY ARE SO CUTE!!

25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 

26. Really soft pillows. Or blankets.

27. Eating pizza in New York City. 

28. Proving people wrong with your success. Take that!

29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. Take that!

30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can.

31. Being able to help other people. 

32. Bonfires. 

33. Sitting on rooftops. 

34. Seeing every single country in the world. And not being ignored. Because, y’know, if you were dead everyone would run into you… it would suck.

35. Going on road trips. Have fun doing that as a ghost, or whatever.

36. You might win the lottery someday, who knows! How would you enter while you’re dead?!

37. Listening to music in your own special place.

38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower, staring down at everyone with the wind in your hair.

39. Taking really cool pictures.

40. Literally meeting thousands of new people.

41. Hearing crazy stories. 

42. Telling crazy stories.

43. Eating ice cream on a hot day with your best friends.

44. More interesting books or episodes could come out, you never know. It’s gonna be hard to get books or watch Netflix/Hulu/Etc while you’re dead.

45. Travelling to another planet someday. It’s gonna happen.

46. Having an underwater house.

47. Randomly running into your hero on the street

48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel.

49. Trampolines.

50. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again.

51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke.

52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 

53. People do care. 

54. Treehouses, you won’t really be able to have a treehouse while dead.

55. Hanging out with your soulmate in a treehouse 

55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees. 

56. I love you. Platonically.

57. I care about you. 

58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 

59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. You won’t even be influenced by it.

60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS!

61. Starbucks. Or caribou coffee.

62. Hugs. The kind that makes you squeal because of how tight they are, the kind that you really love. 

63. Stargazing with your favourite person in this universe at 4am because you can’t sleep, the grass brushing against your toes as you snuggle together.

64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 

65. You've changed somebody's life. 

66. Now you could change the world. 

67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. Maybe you already have.

68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 

69. You can’t look at any more memes if you're dead.

70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things.

71. Making snow angels. 

72. Making snowmen. 

73. Snowball fights. 

74. Life is what you make of it. 

75. Everybody has a talent. 

76. Laughing until you cry, with your stomach screaming and your lungs flaring in heat. Rolling on the floor, grinning ear to ear.

77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 

78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 

79. It’s possible to turn frowns upside down. 

80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's crap, and never let them take you alive. 

81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 

82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 

83. One day your smile will be real. It will, I promise you.

84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 

85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds. 

86. Laughing insanely hard with your best friends. 

87. Eating weird food. 

88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one. 

89. Sleeping in all day. 

90. Creating something you're proud of. 

91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud that you didn't commit. And if you did, feeling regret that you did.

92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 

93. Coffee.

94. The new season of your favourite show. 

95. Staying up late with your best friend.

96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 

97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 

98. Being able to hug that one person you haven’t seen in years 

99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 

100. But, the final and most important one is just being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, literally anything could happen.

I didn't come up with these, but that doesn't make them any less important.

I can't tell y'all how much times I've really needed help but people just brush it away. I always get this thing where my friends don't ask if I'm okay, and just use me. They use me. I don't think they've ever properly thought of me as a friend. I think of it as if we're walking on the pavement, and I'm the one on the road since there isn't enough space...or if they're playing a game, they always tell me, "Oh the game is full." But that's what I think of it as. But no. Whenever I say they always get so annoyed at me. It's like I can't have my own opinion on things. They've annoyed me so much that I've actually got to the point of thinking of just fighting alone. They've never done what a friend should do.. Ask if I'm okay? that could make my day, but not once they've asked and I know why; It's because I'm the "happy" and "nice" friend who doesn't need help and I'm completely okay! :) I can't tell you the amount of times I've lost one of my 'friends' and they always come crawling back. No, you're not weak. No one's weak. Even people who get bullied, actually they are such a strong people, if you are one of those people. Yes, you are not weak

See how they twinkle and glimmer?

Even in the tiniest bit of light, you shine.

Someone out there, they love you.

Hey, you.



Yes, you.

it's like you.

even if it seems unlikely, I can assure you.



Someone out there, they love you.

8. You are amazing.

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead.

Reasons why you should stay alive.



1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music 
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. 
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. 
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. 
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life.

32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. 
35. Going on roadtrips. 
36. You might win the lottery someday. 
37. Listening to music on a record player. 
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 
39. Taking really cool pictures. 
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories. 
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 
44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 
45. Travelling to another planet someday. 
46. Having an underwater house.

48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 
49. Trampolines.

51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses 
55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 
56. I don't even know you and I love you. 
57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 
58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS! 
61. Starbucks. 
62. Hugs. 
63. Stargazing. 
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. Now you could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you.

THE DEMON WITHIN.       I wrote this poem to let my friend know she was                                                                                            n                                            not alone in her battle with DEPRESSION

Drip by drip, bit by bit
You wear away at my friend
Slowly, but surely, you wear her away
Like flowing water upon a riverbed.

You control the chosen elements
Light transforms into darkness
Joy becomes despair
Her zeal replaced by empty emotions
Demon, you win the first round

Let battle commence 
Learn your lesson well you coward
 You don't tangle with friendship
Your adversary now stands before you
Negating every punch you choose to throw

You dispise those standing in your way
Let:- Darkness become light
Despair morph into joy
 Reinvigorate lost zeal
Demon, youve lost both this round & the fight.

By Random Act Of Kindness. David Williams
Dedicated To Everybody Battling Depression.

DEPRESSION (DARKNESS)  - A POEM
O how I dispise you, youre Invisible to family & friends
You hurt those we love, but ignore our enemies
You creep up on us when we're sad, when we're feeling down
You tell us 'retreat within ourselves', it will help us mend
In truth, you want  to take us on your journey to dispair

I know we've had many battles, I know you, I'll expose you
I'll name you so I can shame you, I will call you DARKNESS
Today you have taken my friend from me
For that I will haunt YOU until eternity
Next time, when I  see DARKNESS on the horizon
Next time, if there is a next time I will be ready for you!

A Poem by Random Act Of Kindness.

Reasons why you should stay alive. 
1. We would miss you.
2. It’s not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow.
4. There’s so much you would miss out on doing.
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear now but it is always there.
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself.
7. You ARE worth it. Don’t let anyone , especially yourself, tell you otherwise.
8. You are amazing.
9. A time will come, once you’ve battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won’t regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better.
10. What about all the things you’ve always wanted to do? What about the things you planned , but never got around to doing ? You can’t do them when you’re dead.
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you , that’s still a reason to stay alive.
12. You won’t be able to listen to music If you die.
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You’ll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about.
14. There would be so many people that would miss you, including me.
15. You’re preventing a future generation,YOUR KIDS, from even being born.
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died?
17. You’re gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you’re perfect.
18. Think about your favourite music artist , you’ll never hear their voice again...
19. You’ll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day.
20. Listening to incredibly loud music
21. Being alive is just really good.
22. Not being alive is really bad.
23. Finding your soulmate 
24. Red pandas.
25. Going to diners at three in the morning.
26. Really soft pillows.
27. Eating pizza in New York City.
28. Proving people wrong with your success.
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life.
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can.
31. Being able to help other people.
32. Bonfires.
33. Sitting on rooftops.
34. Seeing every single country in the world.
35. Going on road trips.
36. You might win the lottery someday.
37. Listening to music on a record player.
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower.
39. Taking really cool pictures.
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people.
41. Hearing crazy stories.
42. Telling crazy stories.
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day.
44. Talking bad about people that deserve it to your best friend and ranting all day.
45. Travelling to another planet someday.
46. Having an underwater house.
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street.
48. Having your own fancy hotel.
49. Trampolines.
50. But, the final and most important one, just, being able to experience life . Because even if your life doesn’t seem so great now, literally anything could happen

Reasons why you should stay alive.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about.

One thing that helped me was to surround yourself with positivity and love rather than people who make fun of you and bring negativity into your life. If that means ditching your current 'friends' and finding new ones then so be it. I did it and now I'm really happy. It brought confidence back and shined a whole new light on my eyes, and from doing that I managed to find a group of friends who all care for me as well as each other. Be yourself and your interests will become others' interests. Trust me it's awesome.

If you feel like no one loves you or likes you, there will ALWAYS be someone who will like you and share the same interests. Be it friends, other people in school/college/work, family, internet friends and communities/ gaming communities. If you don't believe me then you've already been proven wrong by me because I will always be a friend to those in need. I'm sure if you posted a comment on a youtube video all you would get is love and support. Feel free to reply to this and we can chat, or I'm sure others will be here to help too. No negativity here, just positive vibes. All it takes is to say hi, or tell me your interests! 😊

Reasons why you shouldn't commit suicide.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself, if you failed or just simply left scars or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not, it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favorite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music 
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. 
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. 
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. 
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. 
35. Going on road trips. 
36. You might win the lottery someday. 
37. Listening to music on a record player. 
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 
39. Taking really cool pictures. 
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories. 
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 
44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 
45. Traveling to another planet someday. 
46. Having an underwater house. 
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 
49. Trampolines. 
50. Think about your favorite movie, you'll never watch it again.
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses 
55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 
56. I don't even know you and I love you. 
57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 
58. Nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE 
61. Starbucks. 
62. Hugs. 
63. Stargazing. 
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. You could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you.

70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has talent.

Hey.

Hey, you.

Yes, you.

You're the one reading this, aren't you?

Well, let me tell you something.

You need to know.

DON'T SCROLL, please..

I know, I know I'm a stranger here on the internet.

But, I guarantee you, you need to hear this.

Are you in a dark place?

You aren't alone.

We all were there, y'know.

Feeling Suicidal?

Please don't.

I think you matter.

Even if I don't know you, I still think you matter.

You are the best stranger I've met.

So, do something for me real quick.

It's quick, I promise.

Drink some water.

WAIT! DON'T WIPE THE WATER OFF YOUR LIPS YET!

Look, see how they shine?

See how they twinkle and glimmer?

it's like you.

Even in the tiniest bit of light, you shine.

If you want to take your life, think about something.

Out of the 7 billion+ people on this earth..

Someone out there, they think you're perfect.

They love you, so much.

Imagine how much you'd hurt them if you left..

even if it seems unlikely, I can assure you.

Someone out there, they love you.

So keep fighting.

You'll win, no matter how hard it is.

"Fight the storm to see the rainbow". Remember that, okay?

Good, I love you.

Stay safe, handsome/beautiful :)

Some depression/suicide/self-harm/anxiety// quotes that I didn't make up (none of these are in a specific order (they're not best to worst or anything)):

"Depression is living in a body that fights to survive, with a mind that tries to die."


"Sometimes I wish I could disappear, and watch to see who noticed I was gone."


"Cutting is not a trend, it's an addiction.

It's like screaming but no one can hear.

It is an everyday day battle."


"Not all scars show, not all wounds heal.
Sometimes you can't always see, the pain someone feels."


"do you remember when you were a child
and you thought
that when you became a teenager
when you became older,
you would party every night
until 4 am

it's quite ironic
because little did you know
that at 4 am you'd be hysterically crying
debating whether to take your life
or not"

-aa


"a suicide note:

if you haven't noticed
the scars on my hips
or the fake smile on my lips
or the forced laugh that i've adopted
or the way i don't care
about the things i used to love,
then don't you dare stand
at my grave and cry

how can you cry for someone
that you don't even know?"


"My parents think I am lazy,
but what they don't know is that
Depression drains my energy,
It crushes my hopes and dreams,
It takes away my motivation
And makes me want to die."


"I skipped a meal
But no one noticed,
Because I'm fat.

I cut my skin
But no one noticed,
Because I blamed the cat.

I purged my dinner
But no one noticed,
Because the weight stays.

I ended my life,
And everyone noticed,
But it was too late."


"whenever i talk
whenever i laugh
whenever i utter a noise
i realize how annoying
and how stupid i am

i tell myself
to stop talking
to stop laughing
to stop making any noise

and maybe one day
I'll tell myself
to stop breathing

because maybe that's best
for everyone around me"

m.c.

Nobody is probably interested in this   and most likely no one is seeing this  but I just want to share my Life a little here on the Internet. 
Born in a Family of Immigrants in a place with People who are the same as me . I grew up with 2 kids who lived in the same building and we were like siblings. Played together all the time and i would call this the probably happiest Time of my Life . One day both were sent back and with that i was all alone. Now it's Time for me to enter grade school . I was heavily bullied because i looked different from the other kids and i was really a shy kid which didn't speak a lot . The Teachers didn't do much to help only saving things like "stop to bully him" and when i was at my Limit of what i could endure at that time i beat the bullies and as you can expect the Teachers scolded me for that. After they told my parents what happened i got a beaten at Home. I made some Friends from other classes but i was betrayed by them . The only one who i could trust was the guy who took care of the children in the afternoon Programm. Always played chess and other Board games with me . At the secondary school it wasn't much better. I was put into a class with some racist People which made fun of me . I was alone again and if i told my parents they would be mad at me . With all that i was Lonely.  I trusted no one , not even my parents  parents und all isolated myself a much as i could from others. Since you are forced to be with others and work with them in school i put on a mask . At the 9th grade i just couldn't do it anymore. I skipped school just for a day and these would later be multiple days and then to weeks . At that time at Home i had many thoughts about my Life.  All the things i could have done better and the the thoughts about death came . That was in the 9th grade. I thought about being all alone when my parents would pass away and maybe i should just vanish into nothingness. It will happen sooner or later anyway and nobody will miss me. Later when they put me in a different class because i had to repeat the 9th grade things were better but the wounds were already there. I would still isolate myself from others . Even after i graduated idk what to do with my Life right now. I am Lonely  and everything is just tiring. 
This is the End. If you managed to read through all this i am sorry for the bad english and thank you for spending the Time to read this Story of a worthless Person.

I’m just another guy on this earth... but I know so many people have thought this...


I’m just a Xbox player called WizzieWazzie305

And a Discord User named: Whimzy#7253



So you might have questioned yourself, on why people like me....


Who are always smiling....


Who always want to help....



Don’t tell others our problems...




The reason why people like me don’t tell people how we feel...


Here’s why...



We can’t.


When I say we can’t, you might just go “Why not? It’s simple!”

To be honest, it’s much more complicated than that...

Everyone has problems to deal with.

You have yours.

And We have ours.

But when we see you struggle with yours, we don’t think you deserve to.

No one in life has gotten through every struggle alone.

That’s why we help you.

We want you to get rid of your problems, and when you actually do, and smile...


We feel happy that you’re safe from it...

But we’re also sad...

Sad that you, and so many others, see us as a perfect person.

Who knows how to deal with all these problems...

Who’s always happy...

And since everyone sees us like that... no one asks how we actually feel...

And that’s why we’re sad and happy.

We’re happy that you guys got rid of your problems, and are free...


But we’re also sad that we... might never get that help ourselves...

And we don’t wanna tell you our feelings...

Because we don’t want you to feel burdened to help.

We want you to do what you want...

Which is why we can’t tell you guys how we feel.

If we tell you how sad it really is to be Us... then you’ll feel bad...

You’ll feel like you should help us...

And that’s why we can’t tell you...

Cause we don’t want you to feel burdened....

Which is why we wait... every day.

Why we stay up at night...

Why we cry ourselves to sleep sometimes...

Why we play music that makes us think on what we’re doing... and how painful, and brilliant it’s been.


Because we’re helping you.

We’re hurting inside, and no one knows...

And we never tell you, cause you’ll feel burdened, like you should help us.

And we only want you to do what you want.

So when you actually ask us personally, in all seriousness...

Not in “how are you...”

Not in “how do you feel...”

Just pure, worry, even if it’s random.

If you personally ask us if we’re okay, with our personal problems...

We’ll tell you.

It will be a complicated story.

And you may not get it at first... but eventually you will...

And when we tell you, we’re so grateful that you asked us how we feel about our personal problems.

Cause we’ve spent countless hours...


Nights....



Days....


Weeks...


Months...


Years....


And even decades, wondering if we’d ever get the same help we gave others with their problems....

And when you show that you care and wanna help, we feel greater than ever...


Cause someone finally did... what we never thought was possible....


And that’s why... we can’t tell you how we feel about our problems out of nowhere...


Cause you’ll think it’s a joke since we seem so happy.


Since we look like we can take care of those problems...


But it’s so much more different than that...


So when you find us....



Please remember what I told you....



Cause it would mean the world to us....



If you ask how we feel towards our personal problems...


With the intent of wanting to do it to help us.




Thank you, for reading this.... and do share it...



And please, do smile.


It’s what makes us smile too.


Thanks for your time.




-From WizzieWazzie305 or Whimzy#7253

Little girl: What’s on your arm?
Me: Oh, they’re battle scars.
Little girl: You fought in a war?
Me: Yeah. A long and hard one.
Little girl: Wow, that’s so cool! Can I get one?
Me: No. Please don’t ever get any. But I’ll tell you what. Whenever you see someone else with these battle scars, I want you to hug them, okay? Can you promise me?
Little girl: Yes, I promise.

A few days later we went on a short shopping spree. Suddenly the little girl let go of my hand and ran up to a teenager.

Teen: Why are you hugging me?
Little girl: Because... (*points*) You have battle scars just like my babysitter.

The teen looked up at me, and I rolled up my sleeves to show her. With tears in her eyes she only said one thing to me...

Teen: My war is far from being finished right now, but I am not done fighting.

She bends at eye level with the little girl, and says

Teen: Thank you for giving me the strength to keep. You are forever my war hero.

This isn’t original of me, but it’s an amazing story. May people treasure this forever. Please stay safe. :) I’ll send my anonymous love to you

Reasons

 why you should stay alive.

1. We would miss you. 

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself, if you failed or just simply left scars or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not, it will eventually get better. 

Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, 

but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason

 to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 

13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and 

all the people you care about. 

14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 

15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 

16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 

17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 

18. Think about your favorite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 

19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a 

cold day 

20. Listening to incredibly loud music 

21. Being alive is just really good. 

22. Not being alive is really bad. 

23. Finding your soulmate. 

24. Red pandas 

25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 

26. Really soft pillows. 

27. Eating pizza in New York City. 

28. Proving people wrong with your success. 

29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 

30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 

31. Being able to help other people. 

32. Bonfires. 

33. Sitting on rooftops. 

34. Seeing every single country in the world. 

35. Going on road trips. 

36. You might win the lottery someday. 

37. Listening to music on a record player. 

38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower.

100 Reasons Why You Should Stay Alive 

1. Your friends, your family, and your pets would miss you.

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Platonically. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die.

37. Listening to music in your own special place.

39. Taking really cool pictures.

40. Literally meeting thousands of new people.

42. Telling crazy stories.

44. More interesting books or episodes could come out, you never know. It’s gonna be hard to get books or watch Netflix/Hulu/Etc while you’re dead.

45. Travelling to another planet someday. It’s gonna happen.

46. Having an underwater house.

47. Randomly running into your hero on the street

48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel.

49. Trampolines.

51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke.

52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 

53. People do care. 

54. Treehouses, you won’t really be able to have a treehouse while dead.

55. Hanging out with your soulmate in a treehouse

62. Hugs. The kind that make you squeal because of how tight they are, the kind that you really love.

64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 

65. You've changed somebody's life. 

66. Now you could change the world. 

67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. Maybe you already have.

72. Making snowmen. 

73. Snowball fights. 

74. Life is what you make of it. 

75. Everybody has a talent. 

76. Laughing until you cry, with your stomach screaming and your lungs flaring in heat. Rolling on the floor, grinning ear to ear.

77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 

78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 

79. It’s possible to turn frowns upside down. 

80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's crap, and never let them take you alive. 

81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 

82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections.
