Reasons why you should stay alive.



1. We would miss you. 



2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 



3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 



4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 



5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 



6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 



7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 



8. You are amazing. 



9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 



10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 



11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 



12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 



13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 



14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 



15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 



16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 



17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 



18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 



19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 



20. Listening to incredibly loud music 



21. Being alive is just really good. 



22. Not being alive is really bad. 



23. Finding your soulmate. 



24. Red pandas 



25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 



26. Really soft pillows. 



27. Eating pizza in New York City. 



28. Proving people wrong with your success. 



29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 



30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 



31. Being able to help other people. 



32. Bonfires. 



33. Sitting on rooftops. 



34. Seeing every single country in the world. 



35. Going on roadtrips. 



36. You might win the lottery someday. 



37. Listening to music on a record player. 



38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 



39. Taking really cool pictures. 



40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 



41. Hearing crazy stories. 



42. Telling crazy stories. 



43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 



44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 



45. Travelling to another planet someday. 



46. Having an underwater house. 



47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 



48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 



49. Trampolines. 



50. Think about your favorite movie, you'll never watch it again. 



51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 



52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 



53. People do care. 



54. Treehouses 



55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 



55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 



56. I don't even know you and I love you. 



57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 



58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 



59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 



60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS! 



61. Starbucks. 



62. Hugs. 



63. Stargazing. 



64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 



65. You've changed somebody's life. 



66. Now you could change the world. 



67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 



68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 



69. You have the chance to save somebody's life. 



70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 



71. Making snow angels. 



72. Making snowmen. 



73. Snowball fights. 



74. Life is what you make of it. 



75. Everybody has a talent. 



76. Laughing until you cry. 



77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 



78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 



79. Its possible to turn frowns, upside down 



80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive. 



81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 



82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 



83. One day your smile will be real. 



84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 



85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds. 



86. Getting completely smashed with your best friends. 



87. Eating crazy food. 



88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one. 



89. Sleeping in all day. 



90. Creating something you're proud of. 



91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud you didn't commit 



92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 



93. Tea / Coffee / Hot Chocolate 



94. The new season of Sherlock



95. Cuddling under the stars. 



96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 



97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 



98. Being able to hug that one person you haven't seen in years 



99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 



100. But, the final and most important one is, just, being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, literally anything could happen.

100 Reasons Why You Should Stay Alive:

1. Your friends, your family, and your pets would miss you.

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better.

Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. They say the worst feeling is heartbreak, or being sad and not knowing why... but the worst feeling is knowing why, and thinking the reason is incredibly stupid, and thinking you’re dumb for feeling sad...

For me, this is well.. online friends or roleplayers I forgot or never friended or unfriended. Yeah... it’s fucking stupid as hell. But the reason is.. My biggest fear is Forgetting things. I have anxiety because I keep forgetting. I get anxiety attacks when I think about stuff like that. The world keeps changing, the stuff that goes on in my roleplay gets more boring, and my online safe space inevitably vanishes. And I choke up and I panic because I cannot stop forgetting no matter how hard I try. So I listen to music, it’s catchy, it gets stuck in my head so I CANT forget it. It’s my only reassurance. The only thing I just can’t forget. Music.

And the thing I feel really bad about is I had this amazing roleplay with a character named “Xhanthus” and I was named “moon” the roleplay was one of the best I’ve ever had, and before they left I forgot to friend them.. I never saw them again, I always look, though. Trying to find a shred of my past, just looking for a way for things to stay the same. I’m scared of change because so far in my life it just gets worse as time goes on. If I had a time machine I would go so far back that I can’t see what the future might be like anymore, so far that my problems vanish, and all I have to do is survive and live my life. And when I’m alone I dance, I dance to remember the memories of the future, then I can’t bear it so I go to the future again, and I can’t go back, so I draw. I draw a world so perfect, so fake, that I can’t tell the difference between real and fake, and maybe it’s best if it stays that way because if it can’t be that way I feel like I might have an anxiety attack until the end of my time, unable to breathe, like I’m drowning.
Drawing, music, and fear are the only reasons I’m still here...🥺

Reasons why you should stay alive.

1. We would miss you. 

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 

13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 

14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 

15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 

16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 

17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect.

Reasons why you should stay alive.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect.

19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day

One day I was just texting my guy friend (was my crush at the time too) and he said, “Life isn’t worth living.” I thought he was joking around but he kept texting me messages like that. That is when I realized he was suicidal. When I realized I asked him if he was. He said he has been for a few years and told me he was doing self harm. That’s why he always wear hoodies and that’s why he won’t let me wear his jacket sometimes too. Then I started to cry because he seemed so happy and didn’t expect this from him.

He then texted me, “You won’t see me tomorrow at school tomorrow.” Then I started to breakdown, I texted him about how wonderful he is and how life is worth living. I told him that everybody loves and, especially me. I told him about all the memories we made. He kept saying that none of that is true. I said, “But I care about you. If I didn’t, I wouldn’t be here talking to you.” He then stopped texting for a good 10 minutes.

I called him so many times, no answer. Then he finally texted back and said, “Go to sleep Taylor. It’s late.” I started to breakdown even more, I didn’t want to lose him. He made me the person I am today. Then I sent him a very long paragraph about how much I care about him and all the good things he has done and what he is. Then I passed out because I cried too much.

The next day, I arrived to school and he wasn’t there. I freaked and started texting him. Good thing he was just running late. When he came to school, I started to cry again and I hugged him. I didn’t stop hugging him until class started. I told him the whole time, “I thought I lost you. Don’t do that ever again. Stop everything you have been doing that harms you. I am here for you. Everybody is here for you.”

Ever since that day he has been doing better but he still has told me he still has done dangerous things and harmed himself, I get upset at him. But he is much better than that day. Remind you that was a year ago, in 7th grade. I’m heading into high school now and he isn’t going to the same high school as me. But... he is always in my prayers. Please... love yourself ❤️

remember you are always loved. everything is going to be okay.

THE DEMON WITHIN.       I wrote this poem to let my friend know she was                                                                                            n                                            not alone in her battle with DEPRESSION

Drip by drip, bit by bit
You wear away at my friend
Slowly, but surely, you wear her away
Like flowing water upon a riverbed.

You control the chosen elements
Light transforms into darkness
Joy becomes despair
Her zeal replaced by empty emotions
Demon, you win the first round

Let battle commence 
Learn your lesson well you coward
 You don't tangle with friendship
Your adversary now stands before you
Negating every punch you choose to throw

You dispise those standing in your way
Let:- Darkness become light
Despair morph into joy
 Reinvigorate lost zeal
Demon, youve lost both this round & the fight.

By The Beachman.
Dedicated To Everybody Battling Depression.

Okay, let’s get this shit straight, people



     1) A few words for the teens that are actually fucking depressed, I'm talking about symptoms like:


Low energy

Fatigue 

Hopelessness

Guilt

Loss of interest in hobbies

Inability to get out of bed + Binging Netflix 

Lack of concentration / Psychomotor Retardation 

Lack of pleasure / Anhedonia 

Changes in appetite 

Changes in weight 

Changes in sleep pattern

Constant sadness (for unknown reasons) / Melancholia 



Go seek professional help, there's no fucking shame in seeking professional help, 

and people who tell you otherwise are either:

1. People who have never gone through depression,

or

2. Just dumb as fuck, 



It helps to talk with somebody about your situation or whatever that’s on your mind, idc how nerdy or boring that shit is, venting is a great way to deal with depression. 



Therapy is great, it allows you to vent and get closer to solving your problems, just look through the different types of therapies and choose the one that you think is effective and fits your situation.



Take medications if you have to, all forms of treatments are encouraged for you to overcome, or at least deal with your depression, but there are some side effects that may come with antidepressants, also, according to research done by Irving Kirsch, placebos are proven to be 82% as effective as antidepressants. Keep those in mind If you think about taking medications, and choose wisely. 



Don’t feel guilty about your depression, your body is going through a stress response and it’s absolutely not your fault. 



Also, don’t listen to these fuckers that are out here like ‘’sToP bEiNg FaKe DePrEsSeD, kId!’’, most of them are probably just insecure young males that are trying to look down upon others for having any emotions other than anger... sadly, that’s just the type of audience George Miller has attracted as Filthy Frank, even though he was trying to be satirical.



If you’re curious, here are some of the several causes of depression that could help you understand what you’re dealing with.



Childhood trauma: 

The more categories of trauma a person has been exposed to as a child, the higher the risk of them developing depression as an adult.

Example: Emotional abuse, unsurprisingly, is shown to increase the chances of developing depression, dramatically.



Loneliness: 

Humans aren’t really meant to be separated, it’s in our evolutionary biology, you know, the whole thing about tribal community and how our ancestors used to stick together as hunters and gatherers, if you were alone by yourself, your body would be on high alert and stress more. 

It is important to have a sense of belonging to a community, either it's your friend group or family, one needs to feel like they belong somewhere. 



Meaningless Jobs:

Repetitive, dead end jobs that lack challenge, creativity, and purpose, jobs that changes and affects nobody’s life, not even the worker’s, these jobs will make you feel hopeless and insignificant and increase the chances of developing depression.

A global study, between 2011 and 2012, by the polling company Gallup showed that 13% of workers are happy,  63% of workers neutral, and 24% of workers not happy.  



Shit Values:

People who focus on extrinsic values, as in focusing more on what one will get out of something or focusing on social expectations from loved ones, increases the chances of developing depression.

People who focus more on intrinsic values become happier.

Materialism is an extrinsic value, a toxic one too, but so many people, including me, fall for that shit so easily.



Disconnection from nature:

Again, it’s in our evolutionary biology, we’re meant to be a part of nature and move our bodies, that’s why our bodies respond so well to exercise and jogging, especially running in nature. 

According to Isabel Behncke: ‘’We’ve been vertebrate for nearly five hundred million years. We’ve been primates for sixty-five [million years]. We’ve been animals that move for a lot longer than we have been animals that talk and convey concepts.’’ 



Medical Conditions:

Depression could also be another symptom of a different medical condition.

Example: Disease of the thyroid gland is a common cause of depression, it produces a hormone that influences most of the other parts of the body. 

It can cause depressive symptoms, either due to hypothyroidism, producing too little thyroid hormones, or hyperthyroidism, producing too much thyroid hormones.



Sources: 

‘’Lost Connections’’ by Johann Hari

‘’Understanding Depression’’ by Dr. Patricia Ainsworth (Thyroid Gland Part)

When you feel inspired, try writing a short and simple story, it doesn't need to have some extreme interesting plot, it could just be a simple scene and dialogue, make it whatever you want, fantasy, sci-fi, paranormal, whatever. Make a list of shit, books you want to read, artists you really like, or video games you're excited to play. It'll remind you why life is worth living and the shit you'd miss if you weren't here.

Me: They’re battle scars. 
Little Girl: You fought in a war?

Little Girl: Yes. I promise. 
A few days later we went on a short shopping spree. Suddenly the little girl let go of my hand and ran up to another random teenager.
Teen: Why are you hugging me?
Little Girl: Because... (*points*) you have battle scars just like my babysitter.
The teen looked up at me, and I rolled up my sleeves to show her.

DEPRESSION (DARKNESS)  - A POEM
O how I dispise you, youre Invisible to family & friends
You hurt those we love, but ignore our enemies
You creep up on us when we're sad, when we're feeling down
You tell us 'retreat within ourselves', it will help us mend
In truth, you want  to take us on your journey to dispair

I know we've had many battles, I know you, I'll expose you
I'll name you so I can shame you, I will call you DARKNESS
Today you have taken my friend from me
For that I will haunt YOU until eternity
Next time, when I  see DARKNESS on the horizon
Next time, if there is a next time I will be ready for you!

Reasons why you should stay alive.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music 
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. 
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. 
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. 
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. 
35. Going on roadtrips. 
36. You might win the lottery someday. 
37. Listening to music on a record player. 
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 
39. Taking really cool pictures. 
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories. 
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 
44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 
45. Travelling to another planet someday. 
46. Having an underwater house. 
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 
49. Trampolines. 
50. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again. 
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses 
55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 
56. I don't even know you and I love you. 
57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 
58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS! 
61. Starbucks. 
62. Hugs. 
63. Stargazing. 
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. Now you could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 
69. You have the chance to save somebody's life. 
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has a talent. 
76. Laughing until you cry. 
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 
79. Its possible to turn frowns, upside down 
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive. 
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 
83. One day your smile will be real. 
84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 
85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds. 
86. Getting completely smashed with your best friends. 
87. Eating crazy food. 
88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one. 
89. Sleeping in all day. 
90. Creating something you're proud of. 
91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud you didn't commit 
92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 
93. Tea / Coffee / Hot Chocolate 
94. The new season of Sherlock
95. Cuddling under the stars. 
96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 
97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 
98. being able to hug that one person you havent seen in years 
99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 
100. But, the final and most important one is, just, being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, literally anything could happen

little girl: what’s on your arm?
me: they’re battle scars.
little girl: you fought in a war?
me: yeah. a long and hard one.
little girl: that’s so cool! can i get one?
me: no. please do not ever get any. but i’ll tell you what. whenever you see someone else with battle scars, i want you to hug them. okay? can you promise me?
little girl: yes. i promise.

*a few days later we went on a short shopping spree. suddenly the little girl let go of my hand and ran up to another random teenager*

teen: why are you hugging me?
little girl: because.. (*points*) you have battle scars just like my babysitter.

*the teen looked up at me, and i rolled up my sleeves to show her. with tears in her eyes, she said one thing to me..*

teen: my war is far from being finished right now, but i am not done fighting.

*the teen bends down at eye level with the little girl*

teen: thanks for giving me the strength to keep fighting. you are forever my war hero.

⚠️ this is not my story, but i saw it somewhere else and decided to share it too because i want you to do the same to anyone with “battle scars” ⚠️

Depression isn't about feeling sad on purpose, and it's not self diagnosed, depression is a real thing and it sucks but I got through it, I've just come here to vent about the hatred I have for people who say they have depression just to get attention and make people feel sorry for them.
It honestly pisses me off because when I went through that shit it wasn't good but I never wanted to end my life, THAT is a fake symptom. Depression isn't just about being sad, you lose interest in your hobbies and are energyless, I used to sit on my couch and contemplate what depression really is. I used to be in a marching band but I got caught up in my mood swings, and I wanted to quit so bad because I was just so tired and I felt helpless, at this point in time during 2014 your average basic, starbucks, snapchatting, white girl. Would have the qualities of being "Depressed" and "Quirky" and they'd brag about having depression to give them an unfair advantage in arguments so they could guilt trip people, and they say "Everybody leaves me." but the truth is they were never looking for the right people, they just wanted clout. It's disgusting and horrid.
Just keep this in mind. Depression is not an emotion or feeling, and it's not something to be used as a tool, whether you have it or not.

HEY YOU! Yes, you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. 100 Reasons Why You Should Stay Alive 
1. Your friends, your family, and your pets would miss you.
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Platonically. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, handsome, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day. 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music.
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. And boring.
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas. Just… THEY ARE SO CUTE!!
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. Or blankets.
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. Take that!
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. Take that!
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can.
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. And not being ignored. Because, y’know, if you were dead everyone would run into you… it would suck.
35. Going on roadtrips. Have fun doing that as a ghost, or whatever.
36. You might win the lottery someday, who knows! How would you enter while you’re dead?!
37. Listening to music in your own special place.
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower, staring down at everyone with the wind in your hair.
39. Taking really cool pictures.
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people.
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories.
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day with your best friends.
44. More interesting books or episodes could come out, you never know. It’s gonna be hard to get books or watch Netflix/Hulu/Etc while you’re dead.
45. Travelling to another planet someday. It’s gonna happen.
46. Having an underwater house.
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel.
49. Trampolines.
50. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again.
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke.
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses, you won’t really be able to have a treehouse while dead.
55. Hanging out with your soulmate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees. 
56. I love you. Platonically.
57. I care about you. 
58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. You won’t even be influenced by it.
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS!
61. Starbucks. Or caribou coffee.
62. Hugs. The kind that make you squeal because of how tight they are, the kind that you really love. 
63. Stargazing with your favorite person in this universe at 4am because you can’t sleep, the grass brushing against your toes as you snuggle together.
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. Now you could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. Maybe you already have.
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 
69. You can’t look at any more memes if you're dead.
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things.
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has a talent. 
76. Laughing until you cry, with your stomach screaming and your lungs flaring in heat. Rolling on the floor, grinning ear to ear.
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 
79. It’s possible to turn frowns upside down. 
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's crap, and never let them take you alive. 
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 
83. One day your smile will be real. It will, I promise you.
84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 
85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds. 
86. Laughing insanely hard with your best friends. 
87. Eating weird food. 
88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one. 
89. Sleeping in all day. 
90. Creating something you're proud of. 
91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud that you didn't commit. And if you did, feeling regret that you did.
92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 
u93. Coffee.
94. The new season of your favorite show. 
95. Staying up late with your best friend.
96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 
97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 
98. Being able to hug that one person you haven’t seen in years 
99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 
100. But, the final and most important one is just being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, literally anything could happen.

- me a random stranger on the internet.

Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Reasons why you should stay alive.

1. We would miss you. 

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die.

100 Reasons why you shouldn't commit suicide.
1. We would miss you. 
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself, if you failed or just simply left scars or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not, it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favorite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music 
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. 
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas 
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. 
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. 
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. 
35. Going on road trips. 
36. You might win the lottery someday. 
37. Listening to music on a record player. 
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 
39. Taking really cool pictures. 
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories. 
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 
44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 
45. Traveling to another planet someday. 
46. Having an underwater house. 
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 
49. Trampolines. 
50. Think about your favorite movie, you'll never watch it again. 
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses 
55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 
56. I don't even know you and I love you. 
57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 
58. Nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE 
61. Starbucks. 
62. Hugs. 
63. Stargazing. 
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. You could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 
69. You have the chance to save somebody's life. 
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has talent. 
76. Laughing until you cry. 
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 
79. It's possible to turn frowns, upside down 
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive. 
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections.

If you think you are never going to be happy, that you will never get out of depression and that heavy, heavy cloud that's upon you will never leave you, then I have the pleasure to tell you otherwise. I too was once so depressed...I too cried when I was alone and pretended to be happy around other people, while I was dying inside...I too had many suicidal thoughts...But Jesus saved me. Many of you might not believe in God, but He is more than real. I once was crying so, so bad in bed, while everyone was asleep, trying to deal with the pain in my chest...I thought that I couldn't do it anymore and that's when I cried out for Jesus! And little did I know that, that was the best decision I took and I'm not even kidding. Jesus IS hope and IS love, because that night I got so, so calmed and felt so, so LOVED. And since that day my whole depression vanished and I got healed from everything that was hurt inside me. When I was depressed, I tried everything to feel happy, to take that emptiness of me, but NOTHING WORKED, not even a relationship, except God.

If you don't believe in Him, ask Him to reveal Himself to you, you will be surprised, but you have to do it with an open heart. Jesus is not about religion, but He's all about a relationship with you. He LOVES YOU SO MUCH and knows what you're going through. He just wants to heal you and your soul. Jesus saves. He's coming back soon ( everything that's happening in the world right now are signs of His returning).

Reasons why you should stay alive.







1. We would miss you. 

2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 

3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 

4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 

5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 

6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 

7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 

8. You are amazing. 

9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 

10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 

11. I love you. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 

12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 

13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 

14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 

15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 

16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 

17. You're gorgeous, amazing, and to someone you are perfect. 

18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 

19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day 

20. Listening to incredibly loud music 

21. Being alive is just really good. 

22. Not being alive is really bad. 

23. Finding your soulmate. 

24. Red pandas 

25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 

26. Really soft pillows. 

27. Eating pizza in New York City. 

28. Proving people wrong with your success. 

29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. 

30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can. 

31. Being able to help other people. 

32. Bonfires. 

33. Sitting on rooftops. 

34. Seeing every single country in the world. 

35. Going on roadtrips. 

36. You might win the lottery someday. 

37. Listening to music on a record player. 

38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower. 

39. Taking really cool pictures. 

40. Literally meeting thousands of new people. 

41. Hearing crazy stories. 

42. Telling crazy stories. 

43. Eating ice cream on a hot day. 

44. More Harry Potter books could come out, you never know. 

45. Travelling to another planet someday. 

46. Having an underwater house. 

47. Randomly running into your hero on the street. 

48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel. 

49. Trampolines. 

50. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again. 

51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke, 

52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 

53. People do care. 

54. Treehouses 

55. Hanging out with your soul mate in a treehouse 

55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees 

56. I don't even know you and I love you. 

57. I don't even know you and I care about you. 

58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 

59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. 

60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS! 

61. Starbucks. 

62. Hugs. 

63. Stargazing. 

64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 

65. You've changed somebody's life. 

66. Now you could change the world. 

67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. 

68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 

69. You have the chance to save somebody's life. 

70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things. 

71. Making snow angels. 

72. Making snowmen. 

73. Snowball fights. 

74. Life is what you make of it. 

75. Everybody has a talent. 

76. Laughing until you cry. 

77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 

78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 

79. Its possible to turn frowns, upside down 

80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's shit, and never let them take you alive. 

81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 

82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 

83. One day your smile will be real. 

84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day.

100 Reasons Why You Should Stay Alive 
1. Your friends, your family, and your pets would miss you.
2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you. 
3. It does get better. Believe it or not it will eventually get better. Sometimes you have to go through the storm to get to the rainbow. 
4. There's so much you would miss out on doing. 
5. There is always a reason to live. It might not be clear right now, but it is always there. 
6. So many people care, and it would hurt them if you hurt yourself. 
7. You ARE worth it. Don't let anyone, especially yourself, tell you otherwise. 
8. You are amazing. 
9. A time will come, once you've battled the toughest times of your life and are in ease once again, where you will be so glad that you decided to keep on living. You will emerge stronger from this all, and won't regret your choice to carry on with life. Because things always get better. 
10. What about all the things you've always wanted to do? What about the things you've planned, but never got around to doing? You can't do them when you're dead. 
11. I love you. Platonically. Even if only one person loves you, that's still a reason to stay alive. 
12. You won't be able to listen to music if you die. 
13. Killing yourself is never worth it. You'll hurt both yourself and all the people you care about. 
14. There are so many people that would miss you, including me. 
15. You're preventing a future generation, YOUR KIDS, from even being born. 
16. How do you think your family would feel? Would it improve their lives if you died? 
17. You're gorgeous, amazing, handsome, and to someone you are perfect. 
18. Think about your favourite music artist, you'll never hear their voice again... 
19. You'll never have the feeling of walking into a warm building on a cold day. 
20. Listening to incredibly loud music.
21. Being alive is just really good. 
22. Not being alive is really bad. And boring.
23. Finding your soulmate. 
24. Red pandas. Just… THEY ARE SO CUTE!!
25. Going to diners at three in the morning. 
26. Really soft pillows. Or blankets.
27. Eating pizza in New York City. 
28. Proving people wrong with your success. Take that!
29. Watching the jerks that doubted you fail at life. Take that!
30. Seeing someone trip over a garbage can.
31. Being able to help other people. 
32. Bonfires. 
33. Sitting on rooftops. 
34. Seeing every single country in the world. And not being ignored. Because, y’know, if you were dead everyone would run into you… it would suck.
35. Going on road-trips. Have fun doing that as a ghost, or whatever.
36. You might win the lottery someday, who knows! How would you enter while you’re dead?!
37. Listening to music in your own special place.
38. Going to the top of the Eiffel Tower, staring down at everyone with the wind in your hair.
39. Taking really cool pictures.
40. Literally meeting thousands of new people.
41. Hearing crazy stories. 
42. Telling crazy stories.
43. Eating ice cream on a hot day with your best friends.
44. More interesting books or episodes could come out, you never know. It’s gonna be hard to get books or watch Netflix/Hulu/Etc while you’re dead.
45. Travelling to another planet someday. It’s gonna happen.
46. Having an underwater house.
47. Randomly running into your hero on the street
48. Having your own room at a fancy hotel.
49. Trampolines.
50. Think about your favourite movie, you'll never watch it again.
51. Think about the feeling of laughing out loud in a public place because your best friend has just sent you an inside joke.
52. Your survival will make the world better, even if it's for just one person or 20 or 100 or more. 
53. People do care. 
54. Treehouses, you won’t really be able to have a treehouse while dead.
55. Hanging out with your soulmate in a treehouse 
55. Snorting when you laugh and not caring who sees. 
56. I love you. Platonically.
57. I care about you. 
58. Because nobody is going to be like you ever, so embrace your uniqueness! 
59. You won't be here to experience the first cat world emperor. You won’t even be influenced by it.
60. WHAT ABOUT FOOD?! YOU'LL MISS CHOCOLATE AND ALL THE OTHER NOM THINGS!
61. Starbucks. Or caribou coffee.
62. Hugs. The kind that make you squeal because of how tight they are, the kind that you really love. 
63. Stargazing with your favourite person in this universe at 4am because you can’t sleep, the grass brushing against your toes as you snuggle together.
64. You have a purpose, and it's up to you to find out what it is. 
65. You've changed somebody's life. 
66. Now you could change the world. 
67. You will meet the person that's perfect for you. Maybe you already have.
68. No matter how much or how little, you have your life ahead of you. 
69. You can’t look at any more memes if you're dead.
70. If you end your life, you're stopping yourself from achieving great things.
71. Making snow angels. 
72. Making snowmen. 
73. Snowball fights. 
74. Life is what you make of it. 
75. Everybody has a talent. 
76. Laughing until you cry, with your stomach screaming and your lungs flaring in heat. Rolling on the floor, grinning ear to ear.
77. Having the ability to be sad means you have the ability to be happy. 
78. The world would not be the same if you didn't exist. 
79. It’s possible to turn frowns upside down. 
80. Be yourself, don't take anyone's crap, and never let them take you alive. 
81. Heroes are ordinary people who make themselves extraordinary. Be your own hero. 
82. Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections. 
83. One day your smile will be real. It will, I promise you.
84. Having a really hot, relaxing bath after a stressful day. 
85. Lying on grass and laughing at the clouds. 
86. Laughing insanely hard with your best friends. 
87. Eating weird food. 
88. Staying up all night watching your favourite films with a loved one. 
89. Sleeping in all day. 
90. Creating something you're proud of. 
91. You can look back on yourself 70 years later and being proud that you didn't commit. And if you did, feeling regret that you did.
92. Being able to meet your Internet friends. 
u93. Coffee.
94. The new season of your favourite show. 
95. Staying up late with your best friend.
96. Being stupid in public because you just can. 
97. If you are reading this then you are alive! Is there any more reason to smile? 
98. Being able to hug that one person you haven’t seen in years 
99. People care enough about you and your future to come up with 100 reasons for you not to do this. 
100. But, the final and most important one is just being able to experience life. Because even if your life doesn't seem so great right now, literally anything could happen.

- me a random stranger on the internet.

Hey you, sitting behind your screen reading this. I don't know you and you certainly don't know me. But I want to tell you something. Everyone has their own story. Yours might be filled with joy and happiness, or it might be clouded with pain and misfortune. I want you to know that you're a beautiful, wonderful, talented person. Even if your life isn't going the way you want it to right now, I know that you'll be able to make it out alright. I want you to do me a favor. I know I'm just a stranger, but just trust me, okay? Every time you see your reflection, be it in the mirror in the bathroom, in a window somewhere, or in a puddle on the street, I want you to look at yourself and give yourself a hug. Because even if you aren't the prettiest or the smartest or the funniest, you're something that no one else can be: you. And you are the greatest thing you can be. Smile at strangers. Be confident in yourself. Cry when you feel like crying, laugh when you feel like laughing. Treat yourself like a god/goddess because you deserve it. Hold your head up and keep your heart open. You're worth everything and then some. And always remember that no matter what, even if it doesn't seem like it, you're everything to someone. It's one of those nights again. You're sad but you don't know why, so you listen to sad songs to make yourself even more sad. You lay in your bed in the dark with your phone playing music into empty air. You're too tired to sleep. You cry to the songs, sometimes your sobs are loud enough to drown them out. You lay there,  tears soaking into your pillow, it'll be dry by morning, leaving no trace of the night before. You cry so hard you can't breathe. You cry until you're empty. At some point you drift off to sleep, in the early morning of tomorrow. You wake up with puffy eyes, you feel numb. You go through the day running on routine. There's nothing keeping you alive, no reason to keep living. But you never liked the feeling of a blade on your skin, so you just deal with it. Until the sun drops behind the clouds, and you're left in darkness. It's one of those nights again.

How many of you were happy children with no problem at all? Now you have no friends, it feels like no one cares, and no one shows any compassion for you? Every morning you wake up, and fight the urge to stay in bed all day, and not even because you're tired because we all know that all you do is sleep. You seem to know the name of everything on Netflix better than your own friends. Your friends and family just seem like they don't want you around. And when you meet someone who makes the thought of getting out of bed seem great. Everything feels blissful, like a breath of air after you've been under the ocean.  Your friends look at them and try to compare you to this special person who you have seem to have found, and they judge not because they don't care but they always seem to never understand. Your family digs up their past, and tries to force you to be with who they want. When that doesn't work, they tell your special person every bad deed you've committed, because god forbid you are human and make mistakes. You're slowly falling for that person and before you notice, you're already head over heels for them. You don't want to ruin things though, so you keep quiet. You just sit there watching his life go by as it seems like you're almost two worlds apart. You watch them go through endless pain, and soon they're a broken mess. You invite them to things you both love to do, but they decline, they can't seem to get out of bed. You show up at their house to check on them, and you see the pain in their eyes yet the eagerness on their face. You ask how they are, and you can see that they are wearing a mask. You call them out and they become aggressive, and somehow in the middle of all that, they confess their feelings for you. You stand in front of them, dumbfounded, confused. But by the time you could utter the words "I love you," their lips are already on yours. Sadly you wake up and realize that was only a dream.

* 2. It's not worth the regret. Either by yourself if you failed or just simply left scars, or the regret everyone else feels by not doing enough to help you.

* 4. There's so much you would miss out on doing.

I know I might sound like a hypocrite by telling you this when I felt the same. But I'm saying it BECAUSE I felt the same. Because I know what it feels like to be empty, what it feels like to feel nothing. But I'm here saying this from experience, focus on the good memories/thoughts because soon you'll make more and your life will go on. You will fall in love, you will be happy again, you will grow old and die only of old age. Not now, not because of your demons. If you feel like nobody cares you're wrong, I might not know you personally but I love you. You're special to me. I'm writing this message for all the people who are having a bad time. I hope it reaches as many people as possible. It is normal to have insecurities about yourself and not feel up to it, I've felt this way for a long time and even now, in part. Over time, however, I realized that most of my insecurities were actually just generated by paranoia. They weren't true, or my low self esteem made them seem bigger than they were in reality. Our personal perception of ourselves influences the vision of reality in a remarkable way. Sadness creates other sadness just as paranoia creates other paranoia. And life starts to get worse when all this becomes difficult to manage. No matter how big our problems are, it all depends on how we deal with them. Stay strong, I wish the best of luck to you all

Depression is a mental illness that causes you to feel miserable in so many different ways, from being sad and feeling empty, to even just being irritable or tired a lot. Sometimes, they’re not caused by depression and you could just be sad, not getting enough sleep, or you’re in a bad mood, so that’s why you should get tested to see if you have depression or not. Never self diagnose. If you do have depression, you’d most likely need treatment, as in a therapist and/or anti-depressants, or if it’s really bad and you’re thinking of hurting yourself or others, you’d have to get committed into a hospital where they can keep a close eye on you and make sure nothing happens. I hope it gets better for everyone, and if anyone needs someone to talk to and can’t get an actual therapist, there are tons of professionals online who would be more than happy to chat with you, or you could dm me on Instagram @MxlkyWxy.png, or I could give my uncles @, since he wants to be a therapist, is good at talking to people, listening, and cheering others up.

100 Reasons To Stay Alive ❤️❤️❤️
1. to make your parents proud 
2. to conquer your fears

5. to listen to music again 
6. to experience a new culture 
7. to make new friends 
8. to inspire 
9. to have your own children 
10. to adopt your own pet 
11. to make yourself proud 
12. to meet your idols 
13. to laugh until you cry 
14. to feel tears of happiness 
15. to eat your favourite food 
16. to see your siblings grow 
17. to pass school 
18. to get tattoo 
19. to smile until your cheeks hurt 
20. to meet your internet friends 
21. to find someone who loves you like you deserve 
22. to eat ice cream on a hot day 
23. to drink hot chocolate on a cold day 
24. to see untouched snow in the morning 
25. to see a sunset that sets the sky on fire 
26. to see stars light up the sky 
27. to read a book that changes your life 
28. to see the flowers in the spring 
29. to see the leaves change from green to brown 
30. to travel abroad 
31. to learn a new language 
32. to learn to draw 
33. to tell others your story in the hopes of helping them 
34. Puppy kisses. 
35. Baby kisses (the open mouthed kind when they smack their lips on your cheek). 
36. Swear words and the release you feel when you say them. 
37. Trampolines. 
38. Ice cream. 
39. Stargazing. 
40. Cloud watching. 
41. Taking a shower and then sleeping in clean sheets. 
42. Receiving thoughtful gifts. 
43. “I saw this and thought of you." 
44. The feeling you get when someone you love says, “I love you." 
45. The relief you feel after crying. 
46. Sunshine. 
47. The feeling you get when someone is listening to you/giving you their full attention. 
48. Your future wedding. 
49. Your favourite candy bar. 
50. New clothes. 
51. Witty puns. 
52. Really good bread. 
53. Holding your child in your arms for the first time. 
54. Completing a milestone (aka going to college, graduating college, getting married, getting your dream job.) 
55. The kind of dreams where you wake up and can’t stop smiling. 
56. The smell before and after it rains. 
57. The sound of rain against a rooftop. 
58. The feeling you get when you’re dancing. 
59. The person (or people) that mean the most to you. Stay alive for them. 
60. Trying out new recipes. 
61. The feeling you get when your favourite song comes on the radio. 
62. The rush you get when you step onto a stage. 
63. You have to share your voice and talents and knowledge with the world because they are so valuable. 
64.Breakfast in bed. 
65. Getting a middle seat in the movie theatre. 
66. Breakfast for dinner (because it’s so much better at night than in the morning). 
67. feeling of being loved
68. Forgiveness. 
69. Water balloon fights. 
70. New books by your favourite authors. 
71. Fireflies. 
72. Birthdays. 
73. Realising that someone loves you. 
74. Spending the day with someone you love. 
75. Spending the whole day in bed. 
76. Eating a whole pint of your favourite ice cream. 
77. Floating in water on your back and just staring up at the sky. 
78. First dates (even the bad ones make for funny stories.) 
79. Bonfires and s'mores. 
80. Relationships where you love someone but aren’t in love with them. 
81. Coming home to someone you love. 
82. The colour of autumn leaves when they change. 
Summer. 
83. Singing songs at the top of your lungs with your friends. 
84. Cuddling. 
85. Being wrapped up in a warm bed. 
86. Someone’s skin against yours. 
87. Holding hands. 
88. The kind of hugs when you can feel a weight being lifted off your shoulders. The kind of hug where your breath syncs with the other person’s, and you feel like the only two people in the world. 
89. Singing off key with your best friends. 
90. Road trips. 
91. Spontaneous adventures. 
92. The feeling of sand beneath your toes. 
93. The feeling when the first ocean wave rolls up and envelops your toes and ankles and knees. 
94. Thunderstorms. 
95. Your first (or hundredth) trip to Disneyland. 
96. The taste of your favourite food. 
97. The child-like feeling you get on Christmas morning. 
98. The day when everything finally goes your way. 
99. Compliments and praise. 
100. to look on this moment in 10 years time and realise you did it.
PS: there are so many beautiful things to live. so live, and live, and live.

I miss when life was good, when I didn’t have to worry about school. When I didn’t have to worry about fitting in, when i could genuinely smile. Now these days I cant be happy for more then a few seconds. All the lols LOLS and LMAOs all fake, all the smile.. fake. All the I love you’s fake. I genuinely don’t feel any type of happy emotions anymore. When I broke down to my parents about it they could basically care less,, they think it’s all just a phase, yeah a phase that has going on for 2 years. They think me wanting to die is all just a phase, it’s really not most people my age are talking to their friends, laughing smiling.. not worrying about the future, having no idea how bad life can get. I always try my best to make others feel better but I forget about myself the more and more I help people. I wanna talk to someone about how I feel but my parents have convinced me that my “problems” aren’t important enough, they’ve always told me there’s others going thru worse. Ever since they’ve told me that I’ve considered myself selfish because i have a good life. I have a family, food, a home.. I have people who love me but, I have no one who pays attention to me. They always ask how was your day I’d feel too selfish if I said it was bad no matter how much pain there is I’ll never find it in me to vent to my friends or family, I know how draining it can be. Having to deal with yourself and others. It can be so stressful. I love helping others but It’s hard to help others now because if I can’t even help my self how should I expect me to help others. I hate life, I hate myself, I wanna die, but I know if I commit it’ll just pass the pain to others.. but it’s also like just because I died sad doesn’t mean you have to die sad too. I honestly just wanna run away and die. I don’t like life, I don’t like myself, it’s too much for me. I feel like such a horrible person but I’m so young to feel the way I do. My parents probably think I’m attention seeking because teenagers are known for faking feelings sad and fake being depressed.
Not saying I’m depressed because I don’t self diagnose but what if I am. They’d never believe me if I was maybe because I seem “too young” but depression can come at any age and I don’t think they understand I pretend so much I hate it. I know I’m slowly losing everyone even myself but there’s nothing I can do, it’s too late. If I do commit I’m sorry God, I’m sorry mom and dad and siblings as well as “friends” but I’ve gave y’all the signs. I’ve told you guys I wanted to die but always the response is “it’s just a phase it’ll get better” then why hasn’t it, why can’t I be happy anymore. What did I do to deserve to be sad I don’t understand.

i go to this retreat thing every year and we stay in this cabin that is like a house except it's super old. i love everything about it, the squeaky plank floor, the tin roof when it rains, the rocking chairs on the porch, that one window i broke by accident, and even that there are only old AC windowboxes that are noisy and don't keep the heat away for very long at all. its such a magical time every summer when i go. there's a family that we are very close with and they own the house. the older man, the most serene, gentle, peaceful person i know, had his wife die a couple of years back. cancer. i got news a couple of days ago that he got put into hospice. brain tumor. uncurable. they took him off of his medicine and he's basically living out the rest of his life.
i visited him yesterday. its heartwrenching. i remember him as such a warm, simple figure and i saw him in a bed, half asleep and not in the present at all. even though he was mostly out-of-it, he looked uncomfortable. he didn't look familiar. it kinda scared me. when i was waiting to go in, i saw a ukelele in the corner. i don't think it's his, but i just thought of this song. he loved ice tea in the summer and sitting in his rocking chair with our lunch guests. he made us all pancakes and bacon on the griddle. i'm going to miss him so much. he's not even gone yet, but the way he's living is almost worse. they said he's not taking his medicine anymore. he's ready to go, but im not ready yet.






he passed. it was in january. but, you know what? i'm feeling sad (of course) but I'm not worried. well, i kinda am but i just feel capable to deal with it. things are going to be much different this year, but i know i'll be able to handle it. i'll walk in and find the hole he left behind standing at the griddle, and i'll see his empty moccasins and his empty rocking chair.... and i'll cry. but it is going to be okay. the tin roof will still sound as good as always when it rains, i'll still be able to swing on the porch swing. thanks papa joe, it was such a joy to breathe the same air as you.

Honestly, I don't know if I'm depressed, but I feel hurt on the inside every day, but not because I feel like it, but because when I check my memories, I feel really bad. 
I feel bad because when I see how it was my life before, I realize of how such a pain is my life now. 
I don't know if it is obvious that I'm suffering a mental pain, which gets worse every time I feel it.
And the worse part is that I'm too coward to actually tell someone about my problem, especially since I can't, my family is falling apart, I'm not fully considered by the people I spend time with, or I'm just too afraid to actually go and do stuff with them and maybe tell someone about my problem.
To make it even harder is another problem.
The other problem is that I'm so shy that I keep everything, everything I want to say, everything I want to express, causing me stuttering, thing that after years of exercise and practice to cure is slowly coming back.
On the end of December 2019 I thought 2020 was going to be a good year, where I would have been different, 4 years ago I thought too that I would have been better than the me of 2016. 
Instead, 2020 turned out to be a horrible year and has worsen my situation, for me, who recently got 16 years old, for my family, for everybody in the globe.
Sometimes my parents ask me if I'm ok, I always answer that I'm alright, I lie to them, I lie to them because if they knew what it's going on with me, the situation could go inevitably down hill for all of us. 
The reason why I wrote this comment is because I knew that here I wasn't alone after all.
If you're reading this, at least leave a like or a comment, so in that way I will know that my voice has been heard, not with by my mouth, but with my broken heart and my mind, that express to people most of the time fake emotions on the outside, meanwhile on the inside I'm suffering. My mind tries to do good things like watching movies or do a laugh or doing enjoyable things, but deep below I am aware that it won't last long that feeling, and that the ache will return.
I hope that this comment will give me at least that bit of satisfaction I needed after a long time.
These are the words of an introvert, who's dying on the inside, but that will try to stand.

Your life matters. You have an opportunity to live, please don't waste it. You're amazing, don't let anyone change your mind about it.

Getting bullied? Ignore them. You're beautiful, you're not ugly, you're just the right size. You're you, and no one can change who you are.

Family problems? Do something to get your mind of it. Parents can be great, and bad. Sometimes we just need to let our emotions out when stuff like this happen.

Have you lost someone you loved? Don't worry, me too. In fact, most of us have. I know, it's not easy... Listen to positive music to cheer you up, or share it with your friends, family, or whoever you trust if it helps.

Are you going through mental, or physical abuse? Don't worry... Me too. Just keep calm, and try not to yell back from anger. It will make everything much worse. Remember, you're not worthless. That is just trash coming out of people's lips.

Ever heard of "Never give up"? Well, I hope you've learnt this today!

I love you all, stay strong! <3

Dear Humans,
I hope you find the peace of mind that you’ve always been chasing after. I hope that you’re able to sit down with your demons, with your depression and with yourself and finally come to terms with yourself that you’ve only got one body, one mind and one life. You have to start taking better care of yourself. I know that life isn’t easy, but you shouldn’t be afraid of anything. I hope you find it within yourself to answer all of those questions, I hope you find a way to fall in love with yourself. I hope you maintain a healthy relationship with yourself because how can you love others and give away everything that you are unless you fully understand yourself, you know? I hope that you find yourself surrounded by good and clean energy. I hope that you make amends with all of the pain that the past holds within soft memories, I hope that you’re able to remain sober and consistent with yourself. I hope that you give yourself the much needed loyalty and respect, I hope you hold yourself to high standards of being a better person. I hope that you steer clear of people who want to drain you of your energy and I hope you’re able to open your mind to the limitless possibilities even if it starts with a simple smile. I know that no matter what, you’ll always come to terms with yourself. Sometimes I’m just worried, you know? I hope you’re able to clear your blocked root chakra and deal with the anxiety and fears of not understanding who you need to be for yourself. I hope you stop chasing after things just to have a taste of a false wholeness. You always had it within yourself, you don’t need someone or anything to give you that validation. You are amazing and you’re going to grow stronger and stronger. I know that no matter how hard things get, you’ll always be hopeful and give yourself that much needed faith. I love you, please be safe.
